```
## 2. Cong Nghe Su Dung

### Backend
- **Runtime:** Node.js
- **Framework:** Express.js 4.21.2
- **Database:** MongoDB + Mongoose ODM 8.9.4
- **Authentication:** JWT (access token 15 phut, refresh token 7 ngay) + bcryptjs
- **Real-time:** Socket.io 4.8.1
- **Security:** Helmet 8.0.0, custom in-memory rate limiter, CORS (dynamic origins)
- **Validation:** Zod 3.24.1
- **File Upload:** Multer 1.4.5-lts.1 (disk storage, 5MB limit, image only)
- **Logging:** Winston
- **Dev:** nodemon 3.1.9
- **Architecture:** MVC pattern

### Frontend
- **Framework:** React 18.3.1
- **Build:** Vite 6.0.5
- **State Management:** Redux Toolkit 2.3.0
- **Routing:** React Router DOM 6.28.1 (createBrowserRouter)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 3.4.16 + custom theme (primary orange-500, secondary emerald-500, accent amber-500)
- **Animations:** Framer Motion 11.15.0
- **Forms:** React Hook Form 7.54.2 + Yup 1.4.0
- **HTTP:** Axios 1.7.9 (interceptors: auto token attach, auto refresh)
- **Charts:** Recharts 2.15.0
- **Icons:** Lucide React 0.468.0
- **Toasts:** React Hot Toast 2.4.1
- **Real-time:** Socket.io-client 4.8.1

## 3. Tinh Nang Ung Dung

### 3.1. Nguoi Dung (Khach Hang)
- **Dang ky / Dang nhap** voi email + mat khau (co the chi phi giao hang)
- **Dang ky Admin** (can ma bi mat: `ADMINNHAHANGVIET`)
- **Dang ky Shipper** (can ma bi mat: `SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET`)
- **Trang chu** voi hero, banner khuyen mai, danh muc, danh sach mon an (grid/list)
- **Tim kiem & loc** theo ten, danh muc, gia, sap xep
- **Chi tiet mon an** voi topping, so luong, them vao gio hang
- **Gio hang** voi qua doi ten, topping, coupon, phi giao hang (mien phi neu >= 100K)
- **Thanh toan** voi 2 hinh thuc (giao hang / tu lay), chon chi nhanh, nhap dia chi, ma coupon, 4 phuong thuc thanh toan (COD, chuyen khoan, MoMo, ZaloPay)
- **Lich su don hang** voi loc theo trang thai
- **Theo doi don hang** voi timeline tien trinh 5 buoc (dat hang -> xac nhan -> chuan bi -> dang giao -> hoan thanh)
- **Danh sach yeu thich** (wishlist)
- **Thong bao** voi loc da doc / chua doc
- **Ho so** voi 3 tab: thong tin, doi mat khau, dia chi
- **Dark mode**

### 3.2. Quan Tri Vien (Admin)
- **Dashboard** voi 4 stat cards (doanh thu, don hang, mon an, nguoi dung), bieu do Area (doanh thu), Bar (don hang), Bar (top mon an), Pie (phan bo danh muc), don hang gan day
- **Quan ly mon an** (CRUD, toggle trang thai, duplicate)
- **Quan ly don hang** (loc theo trang thai, cap nhat trang thai, gan shipper)
- **Quan ly nguoi dung** (loc theo role, toggle active/inactive)
- **Quan ly khuyen mai** (CRUD coupon: ma, loai, gia tri, han su dung, gioi han)
- **Quan ly chi nhanh** (CRUD: ten, dia chi, SDT, gio mo cua, kinh do / vi do)

### 3.3. Shipper
- **Dashboard** voi 3 stat cards (don cho, dang giao, hoan thanh hom nay)
- **Danh sach don hang** can giao voi nut cap nhat trang thai
- **Lich su giao hang** (cac don da hoan thanh)

### 3.4. Backend API
- **Auth:** register, register-admin, register-shipper, login, logout, refresh-token, get-me, update-profile, change-password, wishlist CRUD
- **Foods:** CRUD, featured, categories, search (text, category, price range, sort, pagination)
- **Orders:** create, get-my-orders, get-by-id, update-status, assign-shipper, cancel, get-all (admin), get-shipper-orders
- **Reviews:** create (kiem tra mua hang), get-by-food, delete
- **Coupons:** validate, CRUD
- **Branches:** public list, admin CRUD
- **Notifications:** get, mark-read, mark-all-read, delete
- **Upload:** single image upload (multer)
- **Admin:** overview stats, revenue stats, top foods, category stats, users management, shippers list
- **Real-time:** Socket.io emit `newOrder` (to admin), `orderUpdate` (to customer), `newDelivery` (to shipper)

## 4. Cac Van De Phat Hien Trong Codebase

### VAN DE NGHIEM TRONG (Can xu ly)

1. **bookingApi khong ton tai trong axiosClient** (`frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js` va `frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx`)
   - File `axiosClient.js` chi export: authApi, foodApi, orderApi, reviewApi, couponApi, branchApi, notificationApi, adminApi, uploadApi
   - Khong co `bookingApi` -> se gay loi runtime khi su dung AdminBookingsPage hoac bookingsSlice

2. **Ma bi mat (secret keys) hardcoded trong code** (`backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.js`)
   - `ADMIN_SECRET = 'ADMINNHAHANGVIET'` (dong 61)
   - `SHIPPER_SECRET = 'SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET'` (dong 94)
   - Nen chuyen vao .env

3. **In-memory rate limiter** (`backend/src/middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware.js`)
   - Su dung Map trong RAM, khong hoat dong neu co nhieu server instances

### VAN DE TRUNG BINH

4. **Inconsistency route branch** (`backend/src/routes/admin.routes.js`)
   - Admin route khong dinh nghia `/api/admin/branches`
   - Nhung branch.route.js lai co `/branches/admin/list` -> khong khop

5. **Old/duplicate files con ton tai** trong codebase
   - `backend/src/models/Food.js`, `backend/src/models/Booking.js` (cu)
   - `backend/src/controllers/foodController.js`, `backend/src/controllers/bookingController.js` (cu)
   - `backend/src/routes/foodRoutes.js`, `backend/src/routes/bookingRoutes.js` (cu)
   - `frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js` (cu)
   - `frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx` (cu)
   - Cac file nay con duoc import o day do nhung co the lam nhieu developer

6. **Don hang shipper chua co action "Nhan don"** (`ShipperDashboardPage.jsx`, dong 119)
   - Chi co nut "Cap nhat" nhung khong co api de shipper tu nhan don. Viec nhan don thuc te do admin assign shipper

7. **"Dat lai don" chua co logic** (`OrderTrackingPage.jsx`, dong 272)
   - Button "Dat lai don" chi la UI placeholder, khong co ham xu ly

## 5. Database Seed

He thong co san du lieu mau voi:
- **5 nguoi dung:** admin (admin@nhavien.com/admin123), shipper, 3 khach hang (user1@nhavien.com/user1234)
- **27 mon an** voi hinh anh Unsplash, danh muc da duoc dinh nghia (17 danh muc)
- **5 coupon:** WELCOME50, GIAM10, FREESHIP, SUMMER20, NEWUSER
- **6 chi nhanh** tai TP.HCM
- **Reviews** cho 10 mon an dau tien

## 6. Cau Hinh Moi Truong

- **Backend:** PORT 5000, MongoDB localhost:27017, JWT secrets, ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174
- **Frontend:** PORT 5173, proxy `/api` va `/uploads` sang localhost:5000

## 7. Tom Tat

Day la mot he thong quan ly nha hang full-stack hoan chinh voi 3 vai tro (khach hang, admin, shipper), tinh nang dat mon online day du, gio hang, coupon, chi nhanh, thong bao realtime (Socket.io), bieu do thong ke (admin), dark mode, responsive UI. He thong su dung kien truc MVC nhua, RESTful API, JWT authentication, MongoDB. Cac van de chinh can xu ly la `bookingApi` khong ton tai, secret keys hardcoded, va mot so file cu con ton tai trong codebase.
```

   111→## Routes
   112→
   113→### Phía khách hàng
   114→| Route | Mô tả |
   115→|-------|-------|
   116→| `/` | Trang chủ — danh sách món ăn |
   117→| `/foods/:id` | Chi tiết món ăn |
   118→| `/cart` | Giỏ hàng |
   119→| `/checkout` | Xác nhận đặt món |
   120→
   121→### Phía quản trị
   122→| Route | Mô tả |
   123→|-------|-------|
   124→| `/admin` | Dashboard tổng quan |
   125→| `/admin/foods` | Quản lý món ăn (CRUD) |
   126→| `/admin/bookings` | Quản lý booking |
   127→
   128→---
   129→
   130→## API Endpoints
   131→
   132→### Foods
   133→- `GET /api/foods` — Danh sách (search, category, sort, page, limit)
   134→- `GET /api/foods/:id` — Chi tiết
   135→- `POST /api/foods` — Tạo mới
   136→- `PUT /api/foods/:id` — Cập nhật
   137→- `DELETE /api/foods/:id` — Xóa
   138→
   139→### Bookings
   140→- `GET /api/bookings` — Danh sách (filter status)
   141→- `GET /api/bookings/:id` — Chi tiết
   142→- `POST /api/bookings` — Tạo booking
   143→- `PATCH /api/bookings/:id/status` — Cập nhật trạng thái
   144→
   145→### Upload
   146→- `POST /api/upload` — Upload ảnh (multipart/form-data)

```text
     1→require('dotenv').config();
     2→const http = require('http');
     3→const { Server } = require('socket.io');
     4→const app = require('./app');
     5→const connectDB = require('./config/database');
     6→const { initSocket } = require('./services/socket.service');
     7→
     8→const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
     9→
    10→const server = http.createServer(app);
    11→
    12→// Socket.io setup
    13→const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
    14→const io = new Server(server, {
    15→  cors: { origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true },
    16→});
    17→
    18→initSocket(io);
    19→
    20→// Make io available to routes
    21→app.set('io', io);
    22→
    23→connectDB().then(() => {
    24→  server.listen(PORT, () => {
    25→    console.log(`🚀 Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
    26→    console.log(`📦 MongoDB: ${process.env.MONGODB_URI}`);
    27→  });
    28→}).catch((err) => {
    29→  console.error('❌ DB connection failed:', err);
    30→  process.exit(1);
    31→});
    32→
    33→// Graceful shutdown
    34→process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
    35→  console.log('SIGTERM received, shutting down gracefully');
    36→  server.close(() => {
    37→    process.exit(0);
    38→  });
    39→});
    40→
    41→process.on('SIGINT', () => {
    42→  console.log('SIGINT received, shutting down gracefully');
```

```text
     1→const mongoose = require('mongoose');
     2→const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');
     3→
     4→const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     5→  label: { type: String, default: 'Nhà' },
     6→  fullName: { type: String, trim: true },
     7→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
     8→  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     9→  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    10→}, { _id: true });
    11→
    12→const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    13→  fullName: { type: String, required: [true, 'Họ tên không được để trống'], trim: true },
    14→  email: {
    15→    type: String,
    16→    required: [true, 'Email không được để trống'],
    17→    unique: true,
    18→    lowercase: true,
    19→    trim: true,
    20→    match: [/^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/, 'Email không hợp lệ'],
    21→  },
    22→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
    23→  passwordHash: { type: String, required: [true, 'Mật khẩu không được để trống'] },
    24→  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
    25→  role: { type: String, enum: { values: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], message: 'Role không hợp lệ' }, default: 'customer' },
    26→  addresses: [addressSchema],
    27→  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
    28→  refreshToken: { type: String },
    29→  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    30→  vehicleInfo: { type: String, trim: true },
    31→  workingArea: { type: String, trim: true },
    32→}, { timestamps: true });
    33→
    34→// Hash password before save
    35→userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
    36→  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
    37→  // Only hash if it's not already hashed (length !== 60 for bcrypt)
    38→  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    39→    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
    40→  }
    41→  next();
    42→});
    43→
    44→// Compare password
    45→userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
    46→  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
    47→};
    48→
    49→// Remove sensitive fields when converting to JSON
    50→userSchema.methods.toJSON = function () {
    51→  const obj = this.toObject();
    52→  delete obj.passwordHash;
    53→  delete obj.refreshToken;
    54→  delete obj.__v;
    55→  return obj;
    56→};
    57→
    58→// Indexes
    59→userSchema.index({ email: 1 });
    60→userSchema.index({ role: 1 });
    61→
    62→module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);
    63→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     3→const variantSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     4→  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     5→  priceModifier: { type: Number, default: 0 },
     6→}, { _id: true });
     7→
     8→const toppingSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     9→  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    10→  price: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    11→}, { _id: true });
    12→
    13→const foodSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    14→  name: { type: String, required: [true, 'Tên món ăn không được để trống'], trim: true },
    15→  slug: { type: String, unique: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
    16→  category: { type: String, required: [true, 'Danh mục không được để trống'], trim: true },
    17→  price: { type: Number, required: [true, 'Giá không được để trống'], min: [0, 'Giá phải lớn hơn hoặc bằng 0'] },
    18→  originalPrice: { type: Number, min: 0 },
    19→  image: { type: String, default: '' },
    20→  gallery: [{ type: String }],
    21→  description: { type: String, default: '', trim: true },
    22→  isAvailable: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    23→  isFeatured: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    24→  soldCount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    25→  ratingAverage: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0, max: 5 },
    26→  ratingCount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    27→  discountPercent: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0, max: 100 },
    28→  stock: { type: Number, default: 999 },
    29→  variants: [variantSchema],
    30→  toppings: [toppingSchema],
    31→  tags: [{ type: String, trim: true }],
    32→}, { timestamps: true });
    33→
    34→// Auto-generate slug from name
    35→foodSchema.pre('save', function (next) {
    36→  if (this.isModified('name')) {
    37→    this.slug = this.name
    38→      .toLowerCase()
    39→      .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    40→      .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
    41→      .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
    42→      .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    43→      .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    44→      .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    45→      .replace(/[đ]/g, 'd')
    46→      .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    47→      .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    48→      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
    49→  }
    50→  next();
    51→});
    52→
    53→// Indexes
    54→foodSchema.index({ name: 'text', description: 'text' });
    55→foodSchema.index({ category: 1 });
    56→foodSchema.index({ price: 1 });
    57→foodSchema.index({ isFeatured: 1 });
    58→foodSchema.index({ isAvailable: 1 });
    59→foodSchema.index({ slug: 1 });
    60→foodSchema.index({ ratingAverage: -1 });
    61→foodSchema.index({ soldCount: -1 });
    62→
    63→module.exports = mongoose.model('Food', foodSchema);
```

```text
     1→const mongoose = require('mongoose');
     2→
     3→const orderItemSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     4→  foodId: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' },
     5→  foodName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     6→  quantity: { type: Number, required: true, min: 1 },
     7→  price: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
     8→  image: { type: String, default: '' },
     9→  variant: { type: String, trim: true },
    10→  toppings: [{ name: String, price: Number }],
    11→}, { _id: false });
    12→
    13→const trackingLogSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    14→  status: { type: String, required: true },
    15→  note: { type: String, default: '' },
    16→  timestamp: { type: Date, default: Date.now },
    17→  updatedBy: { type: String },
    18→}, { _id: true });
    19→
    20→const customerInfoSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    21→  name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    22→  phone: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    23→  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    24→}, { _id: false });
    25→
    26→const bookingSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    27→  orderCode: { type: String, unique: true },
    28→  customer: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User' },
    29→  items: [orderItemSchema],
    30→  subtotal: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
    31→  discount: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0 },
    32→  deliveryFee: { type: Number, default: 0, min: 0 },
    33→  total: { type: Number, required: true, min: 0 },
    34→  coupon: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Coupon' },
    35→  paymentMethod: { type: String, enum: ['cod', 'bank_transfer', 'momo', 'zalopay'], default: 'cod' },
    36→  paymentStatus: { type: String, enum: ['pending', 'paid', 'failed', 'refunded'], default: 'pending' },
    37→  fulfillmentType: { type: String, enum: ['delivery', 'pickup', 'reservation'], default: 'delivery' },
    38→  branch: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Branch' },
    39→  status: {
    40→    type: String,
    41→    enum: {
    42→      values: ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'delivering', 'done', 'cancelled'],
    43→      message: 'Trạng thái không hợp lệ',
    44→    },
    45→    default: 'pending',
    46→  },
    47→  assignedShipper: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User' },
    48→  cancelReason: { type: String, default: '' },
    49→  trackingLogs: [trackingLogSchema],
    50→  estimatedDeliveryTime: { type: Date },
    51→  customerInfo: customerInfoSchema,
    52→  note: { type: String, default: '', trim: true },
    53→}, { timestamps: true });
    54→
    55→// Indexes
    56→bookingSchema.index({ customer: 1 });
    57→bookingSchema.index({ status: 1 });
    58→bookingSchema.index({ createdAt: -1 });
    59→bookingSchema.index({ orderCode: 1 });
    60→bookingSchema.index({ 'customerInfo.phone': 1 });
    61→
    62→// Generate order code before creating
    63→bookingSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
    64→  if (this.isNew && !this.orderCode) {
    65→    const count = await mongoose.model('Booking').countDocuments();
    66→    this.orderCode = 'ORD' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() + (count + 1).toString().padStart(4, '0');
    67→  }
    68→  next();
    69→});
    70→
    71→module.exports = mongoose.model('Booking', bookingSchema);
    72→
```

```text
    15→reviewSchema.post('save', async function () {
    16→  const Food = mongoose.model('Food');
    17→  const stats = await mongoose.model('Review').aggregate([
    18→    { $match: { food: this.food } },
    19→    { $group: { _id: '$food', avgRating: { $avg: '$rating' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    20→  ]);
    21→  if (stats.length > 0) {
    22→    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(this.food, {
    23→      ratingAverage: Math.round(stats[0].avgRating * 10) / 10,
    24→      ratingCount: stats[0].count,
    25→    });
    26→  }
    27→});

    31→    const Food = mongoose.model('Food');
    32→    const stats = await mongoose.model('Review').aggregate([
    33→      { $match: { food: doc.food } },
    34→      { $group: { _id: '$food', avgRating: { $avg: '$rating' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    35→    ]);
    36→    if (stats.length > 0) {
    37→      await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(doc.food, {

    39→        ratingCount: stats[0].count,
    40→      });
    41→    } else {
    42→      await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(doc.food, { ratingAverage: 0, ratingCount: 0 });
    43→    }
    44→  }
    45→});
    46→
    47→module.exports = mongoose.model('Review', reviewSchema);
```

```text
     8→
     9→const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>

    16→    sameSite: 'lax',
    17→    maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,

    32→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Full name, email and password are required');
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    36→  if (existing) {

    39→

    41→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    42→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    43→
    44→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    45→  await user.save();
    46→
    47→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
    48→
    49→  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Registration successful').send(res);

   118→exports.login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {

   120→
   121→  if (!email || !password) {
   122→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email and password are required');

   124→
   125→  const user = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });

   129→

   134→
   135→  if (!user.isActive) {
   136→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Account is disabled');

   142→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
   143→  await user.save();
   144→
   145→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
   146→
   147→  return new ApiResponse(200, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Login successful').send(res);
   148→});
   149→
   150→// @route   POST /api/auth/logout
   151→exports.logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   152→  if (req.user) {
   153→    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
   154→  }
   155→  res.clearCookie('accessToken');

   166→exports.refreshToken = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   167→  const refreshToken = req.cookies.refreshToken || req.body.refreshToken;
   168→  if (!refreshToken) {
   169→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Refresh token required');
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  try {
   173→    const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
   174→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
   175→
   176→    if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
   177→      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
   181→    res.cookie('accessToken', newAccessToken, {
   182→      httpOnly: true,
   183→      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
   184→      sameSite: 'lax',
   185→      maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
   186→    });
   187→
   188→    return new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken }, 'Token refreshed').send(res);
   189→  } catch (err) {
   190→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   191→  }
   192→});
   193→
   194→// @route   PUT /api/auth/profile

   198→
   199→  if (fullName) user.fullName = fullName;
   200→  if (phone !== undefined) user.phone = phone;
   201→  if (avatar !== undefined) user.avatar = avatar;
   202→  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;
   203→
   204→  await user.save();
   205→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Profile updated').send(res);

   212→  if (!currentPassword || !newPassword) {
   213→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password and new password are required');

   215→
   216→  if (newPassword.length < 6) {
   217→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'New password must be at least 6 characters');

   226→  user.passwordHash = newPassword;
   227→  await user.save();
   228→

   230→});
```

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\food.controller.js`

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
     4→const { PAGINATION_DEFAULTS } = require('../utils/constants');
     5→
     6→// @route   GET /api/foods
     7→exports.getFoods = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     8→  const {
     9→    search = '',
    10→    category = '',
    11→    minPrice,
    12→    maxPrice,
    13→    sort = 'newest',
    14→    page = 1,
    15→    limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit,
    16→    featured,
    17→    isAvailable,
    18→  } = req.query;
    19→
    20→  const query = {};
    21→
    22→  // Search
    23→  if (search) {
    24→    query.$text = { $search: search };
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  // Category filter
    28→  if (category && category !== 'all') {
    29→    query.category = category;
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  // Price range
    33→  if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
    34→    query.price = {};
    35→    if (minPrice) query.price.$gte = Number(minPrice);
    36→    if (maxPrice) query.price.$lte = Number(maxPrice);
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  // Featured
    40→  if (featured !== undefined) {
    41→    query.isFeatured = featured === 'true';
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // Availability
    45→  if (isAvailable !== undefined) {
    46→    query.isAvailable = isAvailable === 'true';
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  // Sort
    50→  let sortOptions = { createdAt: -1 };
    51→  if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOptions = { price: 1 };
    52→  else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOptions = { price: -1 };
    53→  else if (sort === 'rating') sortOptions = { ratingAverage: -1 };
    54→  else if (sort === 'bestseller') sortOptions = { soldCount: -1 };
    55→
    56→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    57→
    58→  const [foods, total] = await Promise.all([
    59→    Food.find(query).sort(sortOptions).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    60→    Food.countDocuments(query),
    61→  ]);
    62→
    63→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    64→    foods,
    65→    pagination: {
    66→      total,
    67→      page: Number(page),
    68→      limit: Number(limit),
    69→      pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)),
    70→    },
    71→  }, 'Foods retrieved').send(res);
    72→});
    73→
    74→// @route   GET /api/foods/featured
    75→exports.getFeatured = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    76→  const foods = await Food.find({ isFeatured: true, isAvailable: true })
    77→    .sort({ soldCount: -1, ratingAverage: -1 })
    78→    .limit(8);
    79→  return new ApiResponse(200, foods, 'Featured foods retrieved').send(res);
    80→});
    81→
    82→// @route   GET /api/foods/categories
    83→exports.getCategories = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    84→  const categories = await Food.aggregate([
    85→    { $match: { isAvailable: true } },
    86→    { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } },
    87→    { $sort: { count: -1 } },
    88→    { $project: { _id: 0, category: '$_id', count: 1 } },
    89→  ]);
    90→  return new ApiResponse(200, categories, 'Categories retrieved').send(res);
    91→});
    92→
    93→// @route   GET /api/foods/:id
    94→exports.getFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    95→  const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    96→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
    97→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
    98→});
    99→
   100→// @route   GET /api/foods/slug/:slug
   101→exports.getFoodBySlug = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   102→  const food = await Food.findOne({ slug: req.params.slug });
   103→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   104→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food retrieved').send(res);
   105→});
   106→
   107→// @route   POST /api/foods (admin)
   108→exports.createFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   109→  const food = await Food.create(req.body);
   110→  return new ApiResponse(201, food, 'Food created').send(res);
   111→});
   112→
   113→// @route   PUT /api/foods/:id (admin)
   114→exports.updateFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   115→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
   116→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   117→  return new ApiResponse(200, food, 'Food updated').send(res);
   118→});
   119→
   120→// @route   DELETE /api/foods/:id (admin)
   121→exports.deleteFood = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   122→  const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→  if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Food not found');
   124→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Food deleted').send(res);
   125→});
   126→
```

```text
     1→const Food = require('../models/Food');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả món ăn (có filter, sort, pagination, search)
     4→const getFoods = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { search, category, sort = '-createdAt', page = 1, limit = 8 } = req.query;
     7→
     8→    const query = {};
     9→
    10→    // Search theo tên
    11→    if (search) {
    12→      query.name = { $regex: search, $options: 'i' };
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    // Filter theo category
    16→    if (category && category !== 'Tất cả') {
    17→      query.category = category;
    18→    }
    19→
    20→    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
    21→    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
    22→    const skip = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
    23→
    24→    // Đếm tổng
    25→    const total = await Food.countDocuments(query);
    26→
    27→    // Lấy danh sách - sort: price_asc, price_desc, newest
    28→    let sortOption = {};
    29→    if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOption = { price: 1 };
    30→    else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOption = { price: -1 };
    31→    else if (sort === 'newest') sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    32→    else sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    33→
    34→    const foods = await Food.find(query).sort(sortOption).skip(skip).limit(limitNum);
    35→
    36→    res.status(200).json({
    37→      success: true,
    38→      message: 'Lấy danh sách món ăn thành công',
    39→      data: {
    40→        foods,
    41→        pagination: {
    42→          currentPage: pageNum,
    43→          totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limitNum),
    44→          totalItems: total,
    45→          limit: limitNum,
    46→        },
    47→      },
    48→    });
    49→  } catch (error) {
    50→    next(error);
    51→  }
    52→};
    53→
    54→// @desc    Lấy 1 món ăn
    55→const getFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    56→  try {
    57→    const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    58→    if (!food) {
    59→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
    60→      error.statusCode = 404;
    61→      return next(error);
    62→    }
    63→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin món ăn thành công', data: food });
    64→  } catch (error) {
    65→    next(error);
    66→  }
    67→};
    68→
    69→// @desc    Tạo món ăn mới
    70→const createFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    71→  try {
    72→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    73→
    74→    const food = await Food.create({
    75→      name,
    76→      category,
    77→      price: parseFloat(price),
    78→      image: image || '',
    79→      description: description || '',
    80→      isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
    81→    });
    82→
    83→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Tạo món ăn thành công', data: food });
    84→  } catch (error) {
    85→    next(error);
    86→  }
    87→};
    88→
    89→// @desc    Cập nhật món ăn
    90→const updateFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    91→  try {
    92→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    93→
    94→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(
    95→      req.params.id,
    96→      {
    97→        name,
    98→        category,
    99→        price: parseFloat(price),
   100→        image: image || '',
   101→        description: description || '',
   102→        isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
   103→      },
   104→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
   105→    );
   106→
   107→    if (!food) {
   108→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   109→      error.statusCode = 404;
   110→      return next(error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật món ăn thành công', data: food });
   114→  } catch (error) {
   115→    next(error);
   116→  }
   117→};
   118→
   119→// @desc    Xóa món ăn
   120→const deleteFood = async (req, res, next) => {
   121→  try {
   122→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→    if (!food) {

   126→      return next(error);
   127→    }
   128→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Xóa món ăn thành công', data: null });
   129→  } catch (error) {
   130→    next(error);
   131→  }
   132→};
   133→
   134→module.exports = { getFoods, getFood, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood };
```

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
     4→const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
     5→const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
     6→const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');
     7→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     8→const { PAGINATION_DEFAULTS } = require('../utils/constants');
     9→
    10→// @route   POST /api/orders
    11→exports.createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    12→  const { items, customerInfo, fulfillmentType, paymentMethod, couponCode, branchId, note } = req.body;
    13→
    14→  if (!items || items.length === 0) {
    15→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Order must have at least one item');
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  if (!customerInfo?.name || !customerInfo?.phone) {
    19→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Customer name and phone are required');
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  // Calculate prices
    23→  let subtotal = 0;
    24→  const orderItems = [];
    25→
    26→  for (const item of items) {
    27→    const food = await Food.findById(item.foodId);
    28→    if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food ${item.foodId} not found`);
    29→    if (!food.isAvailable) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food "${food.name}" is not available`);
    30→
    31→    const price = item.price || food.price;
    32→    const toppingTotal = (item.toppings || []).reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    33→    subtotal += (price + toppingTotal) * item.quantity;
    34→
    35→    orderItems.push({
    36→      foodId: food._id,
    37→      foodName: food.name,
    38→      quantity: item.quantity,
    39→      price,
    40→      image: food.image || '',
    41→      variant: item.variant,
    42→      toppings: item.toppings,
    43→    });
    44→
    45→    // Update sold count
    46→    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(food._id, { $inc: { soldCount: item.quantity } });
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  // Validate and apply coupon
    50→  let discount = 0;
    51→  let coupon = null;
    52→
    53→  if (couponCode) {
    54→    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    55→    if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Invalid coupon code');
    56→    if (coupon.startDate > new Date() || coupon.endDate < new Date()) {
    57→      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired or not yet active');
    58→    }
    59→    if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
    60→      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    61→    }
    62→    if (subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    63→      throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    64→    }
    65→    if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
    66→      discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    67→    } else {
    68→      discount = Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal);
    69→    }
    70→    await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(coupon._id, { $inc: { usedCount: 1 } });
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  const deliveryFee =
    74→    fulfillmentType === 'delivery'
    75→      ? subtotal - discount >= 100000
    76→        ? 0
    77→        : 15000
    78→      : 0;
    79→
    80→  const total = Math.max(0, subtotal - discount + deliveryFee);
    81→
    82→  const order = await Booking.create({
    83→    customer: req.user?._id,
    84→    items: orderItems,
    85→    subtotal,
    86→    discount,
    87→    deliveryFee,
    88→    total,
    89→    coupon: coupon?._id,
    90→    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || 'cod',
    91→    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || 'delivery',
    92→    branch: branchId,
    93→    customerInfo,
    94→    note,
    95→    trackingLogs: [{ status: 'pending', note: 'Order placed', timestamp: new Date() }],
    96→  });
    97→
    98→  // Notify admins via Socket.io
    99→  const io = req.app.get('io');
   100→  if (io) {
   101→    io.to('admin').emit('newOrder', { order });
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  // Create notification for admins
   105→  await Notification.create({
   106→    user: null,
   107→    title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
   108→    message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} vừa được đặt - ${total.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ`,
   109→    type: 'order',
   110→    link: `/admin/orders/${order._id}`,
   111→  });
   112→
   113→  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   114→    .populate('coupon', 'code type value')
   115→    .populate('branch', 'name address phone');
   116→
   117→  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Order placed successfully').send(res);
   118→});
   119→
   120→// @route   GET /api/orders/my
   121→exports.getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   122→  const { status, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;
   123→
   124→  const query = {};
   125→  if (req.user) {
   126→    query.customer = req.user._id;
   127→  } else {
   128→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Authentication required');
   129→  }
   130→  if (status) query.status = status;
   131→
   132→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   133→
   134→  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([
   135→    Booking.find(query)
   136→      .populate('coupon', 'code')
   137→      .populate('branch', 'name address')
   138→      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   139→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   140→      .skip(skip)
   141→      .limit(Number(limit)),
   142→    Booking.countDocuments(query),
   143→  ]);
   144→
   145→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
   146→    orders,
   147→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
   148→  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);
   149→});
   150→
   151→// @route   GET /api/orders/:id
   152→exports.getOrderById = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   153→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id)
   154→    .populate('coupon', 'code type value')
   155→    .populate('branch', 'name address phone openHours')
   156→    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   157→    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');
   158→
   159→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   160→
   161→  // Check ownership
   162→  if (req.user && order.customer?._id?.toString() !== req.user._id.toString() && req.user.role !== 'admin') {
   163→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  return new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order retrieved').send(res);
   167→});
   168→
   169→// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/status (admin/shipper)
   170→exports.updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   171→  const { status, note, cancelReason } = req.body;
   172→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   173→
   174→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   175→
   176→  const validTransitions = {
   177→    pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
   178→    confirmed: ['preparing', 'cancelled'],
   179→    preparing: ['delivering', 'cancelled'],
   180→    delivering: ['done', 'cancelled'],
   181→    done: [],
   182→    cancelled: [],
   183→  };
   184→
   185→  if (!validTransitions[order.status]?.includes(status)) {
   186→    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Cannot change status from "${order.status}" to "${status}"`);
   187→  }
   188→
   189→  order.status = status;
   190→  order.trackingLogs.push({
   191→    status,
   192→    note: note || `Status changed to ${status}`,
   193→    timestamp: new Date(),
   194→    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'System',
   195→  });
   196→
   197→  if (cancelReason) order.cancelReason = cancelReason;
   198→
   199→  await order.save();
   200→
   201→  // Notify customer
   202→  if (order.customer) {
   203→    await Notification.create({
   204→      user: order.customer,
   205→      title: 'Cập nhật đơn hàng',
   206→      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được cập nhật: ${status}`,
   207→      type: 'order',
   208→      link: `/orders/${order._id}`,
   209→    });
   210→
   211→    // Socket.io to customer
   212→    const io = req.app.get('io');
   213→    if (io) {
   214→      io.to(`user:${order.customer}`).emit('orderUpdate', { orderId: order._id, status, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   215→    }
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  // Notify assigned shipper
   219→  if (order.assignedShipper && status === 'confirmed') {
   220→    const shipper = await User.findById(order.assignedShipper);
   221→    if (shipper) {
   222→      await Notification.create({
   223→        user: order.assignedShipper,
   224→        title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
   225→        message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được xác nhận. Sẵn sàng giao!`,
   226→        type: 'order',
   227→        link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
   228→      });
   229→    }
   230→  }
   231→
   232→  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   233→    .populate('coupon', 'code')
   234→    .populate('branch', 'name address')
   235→    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   236→    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');
   237→
   238→  return new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Order status updated').send(res);
   239→});
   240→
   241→// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/assign-shipper (admin)
   242→exports.assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   243→  const { shipperId } = req.body;
   244→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   245→
   246→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   247→  if (!['pending', 'confirmed'].includes(order.status)) {
   248→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot assign shipper to this order');
   249→  }
   250→
   251→  order.assignedShipper = shipperId;
   252→  await order.save();
   253→
   254→  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   255→    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   256→    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');
   257→
   258→  if (shipperId) {
   259→    await Notification.create({

   261→      title: 'Có đơn hàng mới',
   262→      message: `Bạn được giao đơn hàng ${order.orderCode}`,
   263→      type: 'order',
   264→      link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
   265→    });
   266→
   267→    const io = req.app.get('io');
   268→    if (io) {
   269→      io.to(`user:${shipperId}`).emit('newDelivery', { _id: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   270→      io.to('shipper').emit('orderAssigned', { _id: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   271→    }
   272→  }
   273→
   274→  return new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Shipper assigned').send(res);
   275→});
   276→
   277→// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel
   278→exports.cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   279→  const { reason } = req.body;
   280→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   281→
   282→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   283→  if (['done', 'cancelled'].includes(order.status)) {
   284→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot cancel this order');
   285→  }
   286→
   287→  order.status = 'cancelled';
   288→  order.cancelReason = reason || 'Cancelled by customer';
   289→  order.trackingLogs.push({
   290→    status: 'cancelled',
   291→    note: reason || 'Cancelled by customer',
   292→    timestamp: new Date(),
   293→    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'Customer',
   294→  });
   295→  await order.save();
   296→
   297→  if (order.customer) {
   298→    await Notification.create({
   299→      user: order.customer,
   300→      title: 'Đơn hàng đã hủy',
   301→      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được hủy`,
   302→      type: 'order',
   303→    });
   304→
   305→    const io = req.app.get('io');
   306→    if (io) {
   307→      io.to(`user:${order.customer}`).emit('orderUpdate', { orderId: order._id, status: 'cancelled', orderCode: order.orderCode });
   308→    }
   309→  }
   310→
   311→  return new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order cancelled').send(res);
   312→});
   313→
   314→// @route   GET /api/orders (admin)
   315→exports.getAllOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   316→  const { status, search, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;
   317→
   318→  const query = {};
   319→  if (status && status !== 'all') query.status = status;
   320→  if (search) {
   321→    query.$or = [
   322→      { orderCode: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   323→      { 'customerInfo.name': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   324→      { 'customerInfo.phone': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   325→    ];
   326→  }
   327→
   328→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   329→
   330→  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([
   331→    Booking.find(query)
   332→      .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone avatar')
   333→      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   334→      .populate('branch', 'name address')
   335→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   336→      .skip(skip)
   337→      .limit(Number(limit)),
   338→    Booking.countDocuments(query),
   339→  ]);
   340→
   341→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
   342→    orders,
   343→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
   344→  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);
   345→});
   346→
   347→// @route   GET /api/orders/shipper/pending (shipper)
   348→exports.getShipperOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   349→  const { status } = req.query;
   350→  const query = {};
   351→
   352→  if (req.user.role === 'shipper') {
   353→    query.assignedShipper = req.user._id;
   354→  }
   355→  if (status) query.status = status;
   356→
   357→  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
   358→    .populate('customer', 'fullName phone')
   359→    .populate('branch', 'name address')
   360→    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   361→    .limit(50);
   362→
   363→  // Compute stats
   364→  const today = new Date();
   365→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   366→
   367→  const [pending, delivering, completedToday] = await Promise.all([
   368→    Booking.countDocuments({ ...query, status: { $in: ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing'] } }),
   369→    Booking.countDocuments({ ...query, status: 'delivering' }),
   370→    Booking.countDocuments({
   371→      ...query,
   372→      status: 'done',
   373→      updatedAt: { $gte: today },
   374→    }),
   375→  ]);
   376→
   377→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
   378→    orders,
   379→    stats: { pending, delivering, completedToday },
   380→  }, 'Shipper orders retrieved').send(res);
   381→});
   382→
```

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Review = require('../models/Review.model');
     4→const Booking = require('../models/Booking.model');
     5→const Food = require('../models/Food.model');
     6→
     7→// @route   POST /api/reviews
     8→exports.createReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     9→  const { foodId, rating, comment } = req.body;
    10→
    11→  if (!foodId || !rating) {
    12→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID and rating are required');
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  if (rating < 1 || rating > 5) {
    16→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Rating must be between 1 and 5');
    17→  }
    18→
    19→  // Check if user has purchased this food
    20→  const hasPurchased = await Booking.findOne({
    21→    customer: req.user._id,
    22→    'items.foodId': foodId,
    23→    status: 'done',
    24→  });
    25→
    26→  const isVerified = !!hasPurchased;
    27→
    28→  // Check if user already reviewed this food
    29→  const existing = await Review.findOne({ user: req.user._id, food: foodId });
    30→  if (existing) {
    31→    existing.rating = rating;
    32→    existing.comment = comment || '';
    33→    existing.isVerified = isVerified || existing.isVerified;
    34→    await existing.save();
    35→    return new ApiResponse(200, existing.populate('user', 'fullName avatar'), 'Review updated').send(res);
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  const review = await Review.create({
    39→    user: req.user._id,
    40→    food: foodId,
    41→    rating,
    42→    comment: comment || '',
    43→    isVerified,
    44→  });
    45→
    46→  const populated = await Review.findById(review._id).populate('user', 'fullName avatar');
    47→
    48→  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Review created').send(res);
    49→});
    50→
    51→// @route   GET /api/reviews/food/:foodId
    52→exports.getFoodReviews = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    53→  const { page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;
    54→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    55→
    56→  const [reviews, total] = await Promise.all([
    57→    Review.find({ food: req.params.foodId })
    58→      .populate('user', 'fullName avatar')
    59→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    60→      .skip(skip)
    61→      .limit(Number(limit)),
    62→    Review.countDocuments({ food: req.params.foodId }),
    63→  ]);
    64→
    65→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    66→    reviews,
    67→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
    68→  }, 'Reviews retrieved').send(res);
    69→});
    70→
    71→// @route   DELETE /api/reviews/:id
    72→exports.deleteReview = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    73→  const review = await Review.findById(req.params.id);
    74→  if (!review) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Review not found');
    75→
    76→  if (req.user.role !== 'admin' && review.user.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
    77→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Access denied');
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  await Review.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
    81→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Review deleted').send(res);
    82→});
    83→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\coupon.controller.js`

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Coupon = require('../models/Coupon.model');
     4→
     5→// @route   POST /api/coupons/validate
     6→exports.validateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     7→  const { code, subtotal } = req.body;
     8→
     9→  if (!code) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code is required');
    10→
    11→  const coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: code.toUpperCase() });
    12→
    13→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    14→  if (!coupon.isActive) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is inactive');
    15→  if (coupon.startDate > new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon is not yet active');
    16→  if (coupon.endDate < new Date()) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired');
    17→  if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
    18→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    19→  }
    20→  if (subtotal !== undefined && subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    21→    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  let discount = 0;
    25→  const effectiveSubtotal = subtotal || 0;
    26→  if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
    27→    discount = Math.min((effectiveSubtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    28→  } else {
    29→    discount = Math.min(coupon.value, effectiveSubtotal);
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    33→    coupon: { code: coupon.code, type: coupon.type, value: coupon.value },
    34→    discount: Math.round(discount),
    35→    message: 'Coupon is valid',
    36→  }, 'Coupon validated').send(res);
    37→});
    38→
    39→// Admin CRUD
    40→
    41→// @route   GET /api/coupons
    42→exports.getAllCoupons = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    43→  const coupons = await Coupon.find().sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    44→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupons, 'Coupons retrieved').send(res);
    45→});
    46→
    47→// @route   POST /api/coupons
    48→exports.createCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    49→  const existing = await Coupon.findOne({ code: req.body.code.toUpperCase() });
    50→  if (existing) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon code already exists');
    51→
    52→  const coupon = await Coupon.create(req.body);
    53→  return new ApiResponse(201, coupon, 'Coupon created').send(res);
    54→});
    55→
    56→// @route   PUT /api/coupons/:id
    57→exports.updateCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    58→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true, runValidators: true });
    59→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    60→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, 'Coupon updated').send(res);
    61→});
    62→
    63→// @route   DELETE /api/coupons/:id
    64→exports.deleteCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    65→  const coupon = await Coupon.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
    66→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    67→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Coupon deleted').send(res);
    68→});
    69→
    70→// @route   PATCH /api/coupons/:id/toggle
    71→exports.toggleCoupon = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    72→  const coupon = await Coupon.findById(req.params.id);
    73→  if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Coupon not found');
    74→  coupon.isActive = !coupon.isActive;
    75→  await coupon.save();
    76→  return new ApiResponse(200, coupon, `Coupon ${coupon.isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'}`).send(res);
    77→});
    78→
```

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\controllers\notification.controller.js`

```text
     1→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     2→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     3→const Notification = require('../models/Notification.model');
     4→
     5→// @route   GET /api/notifications
     6→exports.getNotifications = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
     7→  const { page = 1, limit = 20, unreadOnly } = req.query;
     8→  const query = { user: req.user._id };
     9→  if (unreadOnly === 'true') query.isRead = false;
    10→
    11→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
    12→
    13→  const [notifications, total, unreadCount] = await Promise.all([
    14→    Notification.find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 }).skip(skip).limit(Number(limit)),
    15→    Notification.countDocuments(query),
    16→    Notification.countDocuments({ user: req.user._id, isRead: false }),
    17→  ]);
    18→
    19→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
    20→    notifications,
    21→    unreadCount,
    22→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
    23→  }, 'Notifications retrieved').send(res);
    24→});
    25→
    26→// @route   PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read
    27→exports.markAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    28→  const notification = await Notification.findOneAndUpdate(
    29→    { _id: req.params.id, user: req.user._id },
    30→    { isRead: true },
    31→    { new: true },
    32→  );
    33→  if (!notification) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Notification not found');
    34→  return new ApiResponse(200, notification, 'Marked as read').send(res);
    35→});
    36→
    37→// @route   PATCH /api/notifications/read-all
    38→exports.markAllAsRead = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    39→  await Notification.updateMany({ user: req.user._id, isRead: false }, { isRead: true });
    40→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'All notifications marked as read').send(res);
    41→});
    42→
    43→// @route   DELETE /api/notifications/:id
    44→exports.deleteNotification = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    45→  const notification = await Notification.findOneAndDelete({ _id: req.params.id, user: req.user._id });
    46→  if (!notification) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Notification not found');
    47→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Notification deleted').send(res);
    48→});
    49→
```

```text
     1→// Global error handler middleware
     2→const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
     3→  let statusCode = err.statusCode || 500;
     4→  let message = err.message || 'Lỗi server';
     5→
     6→  // Mongoose bad ObjectId
     7→  if (err.name === 'CastError') {
     8→    statusCode = 400;
     9→    message = 'ID không hợp lệ';
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  // Mongoose duplicate key
    13→  if (err.code === 11000) {
    14→    statusCode = 400;
    15→    message = 'Dữ liệu trùng lặp';
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  // Mongoose validation error
    19→  if (err.name === 'ValidationError') {
    20→    statusCode = 400;
    21→    const messages = Object.values(err.errors).map((e) => e.message);
    22→    message = messages.join(', ');
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  res.status(statusCode).json({
    26→    success: false,
    27→    message,
    28→    data: null,
    29→  });
    30→};
    31→
    32→module.exports = errorHandler;
    33→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→const multer = require('multer');
     2→const path = require('path');
     3→
     4→// Storage config
     5→const storage = multer.diskStorage({
     6→  destination: (req, file, cb) => {
     7→    cb(null, path.join(__dirname, '../uploads'));
     8→  },
     9→  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
    10→    const uniqueSuffix = Date.now() + '-' + Math.round(Math.random() * 1e9);
    11→    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname);
    12→    cb(null, `food-${uniqueSuffix}${ext}`);
    13→  },
    14→});
    15→
    16→// File filter - chỉ chấp nhận ảnh
    17→const fileFilter = (req, file, cb) => {
    18→  const allowedTypes = /jpeg|jpg|png|gif|webp|svg/;
    19→  const extname = allowedTypes.test(path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase());
    20→  const mimetype = allowedTypes.test(file.mimetype);
    21→
    22→  if (extname && mimetype) {
    23→    cb(null, true);
    24→  } else {
    25→    cb(new Error('Chỉ chấp nhận file ảnh (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp)'), false);
    26→  }
    27→};
    28→
    29→const upload = multer({
    30→  storage,
    31→  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 5MB
    32→  fileFilter,
    33→});
    34→
    35→module.exports = upload;
    36→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middlewares\auth.middleware.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     4→
     5→const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
     6→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Access token required. Please login.', data: null });
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  try {
    12→    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    13→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    14→    if (!user || !user.isActive) {
    15→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid or inactive user', data: null });
    16→    }
    17→    req.user = user;
    18→    next();
    19→  } catch (err) {
    20→    if (err.name === 'JsonWebTokenError' || err.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
    21→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token is invalid or expired', data: null });
    22→    }
    23→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication failed', data: null });
    24→  }
    25→});
    26→
    27→const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
    28→  if (!req.user) {
    29→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication required', data: null });
    30→  }
    31→  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    32→    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Insufficient permissions', data: null });
    33→  }
    34→  next();
    35→};
    36→
    37→const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
    39→  if (token) {
    40→    try {
    41→      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    42→      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    43→    } catch {
    44→      // Token invalid, continue without user
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→  next();
    48→});
    49→
    50→module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };
    51→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middlewares\rateLimiter.middleware.js`

```text
     1→const rateLimitStore = new Map();
     2→
     3→const rateLimiter = (options = {}) => {
     4→  const { windowMs = 15 * 60 * 1000, max = 100, message = 'Too many requests' } = options;
     5→
     6→  return (req, res, next) => {
     7→    const key = req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress;
     8→    const now = Date.now();
     9→
    10→    if (!rateLimitStore.has(key)) {
    11→      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
    12→      return next();
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    const record = rateLimitStore.get(key);
    16→
    17→    if (now > record.resetTime) {
    18→      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
    19→      return next();
    20→    }
    21→
    22→    record.count++;
    23→
    24→    if (record.count > max) {
    25→      return res.status(429).json({
    26→        success: false,
    27→        message,
    28→        data: null,
    29→      });
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    next();
    33→  };
    34→};
    35→
    36→// Cleanup old entries periodically
    37→setInterval(() => {
    38→  const now = Date.now();
    39→  for (const [key, value] of rateLimitStore.entries()) {
    40→    if (now > value.resetTime) {
    41→      rateLimitStore.delete(key);
    42→    }
    43→  }
    44→}, 60000);
    45→
    46→module.exports = rateLimiter;
    47→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     3→
     4→function initSocket(io) {
     5→  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
     6→    // Authenticate socket connection
     7→    const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
     8→    if (token) {
     9→      try {
    10→        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    11→        User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken').then((user) => {
    12→          if (user) {
    13→            socket.user = user;
    14→            socket.join(`user:${user._id}`);
    15→            if (user.role === 'admin') socket.join('admin');
    16→            if (user.role === 'shipper') socket.join('shipper');
    17→            socket.emit('connected', { userId: user._id, role: user.role });
    18→          }
    19→        }).catch(() => {});
    20→      } catch {}
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    // Join room
    24→    socket.on('join', (data) => {
    25→      if (data.room) {
    26→        socket.join(data.room);
    27→      }
    28→      if (data.type === 'guest' && data.phone) {
    29→        socket.join(`guest:${data.phone}`);
    30→      }
    31→    });
    32→
    33→    // Leave room
    34→    socket.on('leave', (data) => {
    35→      if (data.room) {
    36→        socket.leave(data.room);
    37→      }
    38→    });
    39→
    40→    socket.on('disconnect', () => {});
    41→  });
    42→
    43→  return io;
    44→}
    45→
    46→module.exports = { initSocket };
    47→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    73→    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    74→    .replace(/[đ]/g, 'd')
    75→    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    76→    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    77→    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
    78→
    79→const seedData = async () => {
    80→  try {
    81→    await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI);
    82→    console.log('🔄 Đang seed dữ liệu...');
    83→
    84→    // Clear all collections
    85→    await Promise.all([
    86→      User.deleteMany({}),
    87→      Food.deleteMany({}),
    88→      Booking.deleteMany({}),
    89→      Coupon.deleteMany({}),
    90→      Branch.deleteMany({}),
    91→      Review.deleteMany({}),
    92→    ]);
    93→    console.log('   ✓ Đã xóa dữ liệu cũ');
    94→
    95→    // Seed users
    96→    await User.insertMany(seedUsers);
    97→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedUsers.length} users (admin, shipper, customers)`);
    98→
    99→    // Seed foods (create one by one to trigger pre-save hooks for slug)
   100→    const foods = [];
   101→    for (const foodData of seedFoods) {
   102→      const food = new Food(foodData);
   103→      if (!food.slug) {
   104→        food.slug = slugify(food.name);
   105→      }
   106→      await food.save();
   107→      foods.push(food);
   108→    }
   109→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${foods.length} món ăn`);
   110→
   111→    // Seed coupons
   112→    await Coupon.insertMany(seedCoupons);
   113→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedCoupons.length} coupons`);
   114→
   115→    // Seed branches
   116→    await Branch.insertMany(seedBranches);
   117→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedBranches.length} chi nhánh`);
   118→
   119→    // Seed some reviews
   120→    const adminUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'admin' });
   121→    const customerUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'customer' });
   122→    const reviews = [];
   123→    if (foods.length > 0 && customerUser) {
   124→      for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(foods.length, 10); i++) {
   125→        reviews.push({
   126→          user: customerUser._id,
   127→          food: foods[i]._id,
   128→          rating: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 4,
   129→          comment: ['Món ăn ngon lắm!', 'Giao hàng nhanh, đồ ăn còn nóng.', 'Rất hài lòng, sẽ order lại.', 'Chất lượng tuyệt vời!', 'Giá cả hợp lý, sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè.'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)],
   130→          isVerified: true,
   131→        });
   132→      }
   133→      await Review.insertMany(reviews);
   134→      console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${reviews.length} reviews`);
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    console.log('\n✅ Seed hoàn tất!');
   138→    console.log('\n📋 Tài khoản test:');
   139→    console.log('   Admin:   admin@nhavien.com / admin123');
   140→    console.log('   Shipper: shipper@nhavien.com / shipper123');
   141→    console.log('   User:    user1@nhavien.com / user1234');
   142→
   143→    process.exit(0);
   144→  } catch (error) {
   145→    console.error('❌ Lỗi seed:', error.message);
   146→    process.exit(1);
   147→  }
   148→};
   149→
   150→seedData();
   151→
```

```text
     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { RouterProvider } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { Provider } from 'react-redux';
     4→import store from './store';
     5→import router from './routes';
     6→import { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast';
     7→import socketService from './lib/socket';
     8→
     9→function App() {
    10→  // Initialize dark mode from localStorage
    11→  useEffect(() => {
    12→    const isDark = localStorage.getItem('theme') === 'dark' ||
    13→      (!localStorage.getItem('theme') && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
    14→    if (isDark) {
    15→      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
    16→    } else {
    17→      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
    18→    }
    19→  }, []);
    20→
    21→  // Connect Socket.io when authenticated
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    24→    if (token) {
    25→      socketService.connect(token);
    26→    }
    27→    return () => {
    28→      socketService.disconnect();
    29→    };
    30→  }, []);
    31→
    32→  return (
    33→    <Provider store={store}>
    34→      <RouterProvider router={router} />
    35→      <Toaster
    36→        position="top-right"
    37→        toastOptions={{
    38→          style: {
    39→            fontFamily: '"DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif',
    40→          },
    41→        }}
    42→        theme="light"
    43→        richColors
    44→        closeButton
    45→      />
    46→    </Provider>
    47→  );
    48→}
    49→
    50→export default App;
    51→
```

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';

     3→const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';

     5→
     6→const api = axios.create({
     7→  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     8→  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
     9→  withCredentials: true,
    10→});
    11→
    12→// Request interceptor - attach token
    13→api.interceptors.request.use(
    14→  (config) => {
    15→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    16→    if (token) {
    17→      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    18→    }
    19→    return config;
    20→  },
    21→  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
    22→);
    23→
    24→// Response interceptor - handle errors
    25→api.interceptors.response.use(
    26→  (response) => response,
    27→  async (error) => {
    28→    const originalRequest = error.config;
    29→
    30→    // If 401 and not already retrying, try refresh
    31→    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
    32→      originalRequest._retry = true;
    33→      try {
    34→        const res = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/auth/refresh`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
    35→        const newToken = res.data.data.accessToken;
    36→        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', newToken);
    37→        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${newToken}`;
    38→        return api(originalRequest);
    39→      } catch {
    40→        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
    41→        localStorage.removeItem('user');
    42→        window.location.href = '/login';
    43→        return Promise.reject(error);
    44→      }
    45→    }
    46→    return Promise.reject(error);
    47→  }
    48→);
    49→
```

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\lib\socket.js`

```text
     1→import { io } from 'socket.io-client';
     2→import store from '../store';
     3→import { addNotification } from '../slices/notificationsSlice';
     4→
     5→const SOCKET_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';
     6→
     7→class SocketService {
     8→  constructor() {
     9→    this.socket = null;
    10→    this.connected = false;
    11→  }
    12→
    13→  connect(token) {
    14→    if (this.socket?.connected) return;
    15→
    16→    this.socket = io(SOCKET_URL, {
    17→      auth: { token },
    18→      transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],
    19→      reconnection: true,
    20→      reconnectionAttempts: 5,
    21→      reconnectionDelay: 1000,
    22→    });
    23→
    24→    this.socket.on('connect', () => {
    25→      this.connected = true;
    26→      console.log('Socket connected');
    27→    });
    28→
    29→    this.socket.on('disconnect', () => {
    30→      this.connected = false;
    31→      console.log('Socket disconnected');
    32→    });
    33→
    34→    this.socket.on('connect_error', (err) => {
    35→      console.error('Socket connection error:', err.message);
    36→    });
    37→
    38→    // Listen for new orders (admin/shipper)
    39→    this.socket.on('newOrder', (order) => {
    40→      store.dispatch(addNotification({
    41→        _id: Date.now().toString(),
    42→        type: 'order',
    43→        title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
    44→        message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} vừa được đặt`,
    45→        link: `/admin/orders`,
    46→        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    47→      }));
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    // Listen for order status updates (customer)
    51→    this.socket.on('orderUpdate', (data) => {
    52→      store.dispatch(addNotification({
    53→        _id: Date.now().toString(),
    54→        type: 'order',
    55→        title: 'Cập nhật đơn hàng',
    56→        message: `Đơn ${data.orderCode}: ${data.status}`,
    57→        link: `/orders/${data.orderId}`,
    58→        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    59→      }));
    60→    });
    61→
    62→    // Listen for new delivery assignment (shipper)
    63→    this.socket.on('newDelivery', (order) => {
    64→      store.dispatch(addNotification({
    65→        _id: Date.now().toString(),
    66→        type: 'order',
    67→        title: 'Đơn giao mới',
    68→        message: `Bạn được giao đơn hàng ${order.orderCode}`,
    69→        link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
    70→        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    71→      }));
    72→    });
    73→
    74→    // Join user room
    75→    const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
    76→    if (user?._id) {
    77→      this.socket.emit('join', { room: `user:${user._id}` });
    78→    }
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  disconnect() {
    82→    if (this.socket) {
    83→      this.socket.disconnect();
    84→      this.socket = null;
    85→      this.connected = false;
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  // Emit events
    90→  joinRoom(room) {
    91→    if (this.socket?.connected) {
    92→      this.socket.emit('join', { room });
    93→    }
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  leaveRoom(room) {
    97→    if (this.socket?.connected) {
    98→      this.socket.emit('leave', { room });
    99→    }
   100→  }
   101→
   102→  // Subscribe to a custom event
   103→  on(event, callback) {
   104→    if (this.socket) {
   105→      this.socket.on(event, callback);
   106→    }
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  // Unsubscribe from an event
   110→  off(event, callback) {
   111→    if (this.socket) {
   112→      if (callback) {
   113→        this.socket.off(event, callback);
   114→      } else {
   115→        this.socket.off(event);
   116→      }
   117→    }
   118→  }
   119→}
   120→
   121→export const socketService = new SocketService();
   122→export default socketService;
   123→
```

```text
     1→import { clsx } from 'clsx';
     2→import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';
     3→
     4→export function cn(...inputs) {
     5→  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function formatPrice(price) {
     9→  if (price == null) return '0đ';
    10→  return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND' }).format(price);
    11→}
    12→
    13→// Alias
    14→export const formatCurrency = formatPrice;
    15→
    16→export function formatDate(date) {
    17→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(new Date(date));
    18→}
    19→
    20→export function formatDateTime(date) {
    21→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }).format(new Date(date));
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function formatRelativeTime(date) {
    25→  const now = new Date();
    26→  const then = new Date(date);
    27→  const diff = now - then;
    28→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
    29→  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000);
    30→  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
    31→
    32→  if (minutes < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
    33→  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes} phút trước`;
    34→  if (hours < 24) return `${hours} giờ trước`;
    35→  if (days < 7) return `${days} ngày trước`;
    36→  return formatDate(date);
    37→}
    38→
    39→export function slugify(text) {
    40→  return text
    41→    .toLowerCase()
    42→    .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    43→    .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')
    44→    .replace(/[ìíịỉĩ]/g, 'i')
    45→    .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    46→    .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    47→    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    48→    .replace(/đ/g, 'd')
    49→    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    50→    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    51→    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
    52→}
    53→
    54→export function getImageUrl(path) {
    55→  if (!path) return null;
    56→  if (path.startsWith('http')) return path;
    57→  return `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'}${path}`;
    58→}
    59→
    60→export function generateStarRating(rating) {
    61→  const stars = [];
    62→  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    63→    if (rating >= i) {
    64→      stars.push('full');
    65→    } else if (rating >= i - 0.5) {
    66→      stars.push('half');
    67→    } else {
    68→      stars.push('empty');
    69→    }
    70→  }
    71→  return stars;
    72→}
    73→
    74→export function truncate(str, length = 100) {
    75→  if (!str) return '';
    76→  return str.length > length ? str.substring(0, length) + '...' : str;
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function debounce(func, wait) {
    80→  let timeout;
    81→  return function executedFunction(...args) {
    82→    const later = () => {
    83→      clearTimeout(timeout);
    84→      func(...args);
    85→    };
    86→    clearTimeout(timeout);
    87→    timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
    88→  };
    89→}
    90→
    91→export function getStatusColor(status) {
    92→  const colors = {
    93→    pending: 'badge-warning',
    94→    confirmed: 'badge-info',
    95→    preparing: 'badge-primary',
    96→    delivering: 'badge-secondary',
    97→    done: 'badge-success',
    98→    cancelled: 'badge-danger',
    99→  };
   100→  return colors[status] || 'badge-gray';
   101→}
   102→
   103→export function getStatusLabel(status) {
   104→  const labels = {
   105→    pending: 'Chờ xác nhận',
   106→    confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận',
   107→    preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị',
   108→    delivering: 'Đang giao',
   109→    done: 'Hoàn thành',
   110→    cancelled: 'Đã hủy',
   111→  };
   112→  return labels[status] || status;
   113→}
   114→
```
