```text
    28→// Protected Route component
    29→function ProtectedRoute({ children, allowedRoles }) {
    30→  const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
    31→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    32→
    33→  if (!token) {
    34→    return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
    35→  }
    36→
    37→  if (allowedRoles && user && !allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) {
    38→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return children;
    42→}
    43→
    44→// Guest Route (redirect if logged in)
    45→function GuestRoute({ children }) {
    46→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    47→  if (token) {
    48→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    49→  }
    50→  return children;
    51→}
    52→
    53→const routes = [
    54→  // === PUBLIC ROUTES ===
    55→  {
    56→    path: '/',
    57→    element: <MainLayout />,
    58→    children: [
    59→      { index: true, element: <HomePage /> },
    60→      { path: 'foods/:id', element: <FoodDetailPage /> },
    61→      { path: 'cart', element: <CartPage /> },
    62→      { path: 'checkout', element: <CheckoutPage /> },
    63→
    64→      // Auth - Guest only
    65→      { path: 'login', element: <GuestRoute><LoginPage /></GuestRoute> },
    66→      { path: 'register', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterPage /></GuestRoute> },
    67→      { path: 'register-admin', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterAdminPage /></GuestRoute> },
    68→      { path: 'register-shipper', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterShipperPage /></GuestRoute> },
    69→
    70→      // Auth - Protected
    71→      { path: 'profile', element: <ProtectedRoute><ProfilePage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    72→      { path: 'orders', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderHistoryPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    73→      { path: 'orders/:id', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderTrackingPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    74→      { path: 'wishlist', element: <ProtectedRoute><WishlistPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    75→      { path: 'notifications', element: <ProtectedRoute><NotificationsPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    76→
    77→      // 404
    78→      { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
    79→    ],
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  // === ADMIN ROUTES ===
    83→  {
    84→    path: '/admin',
    85→    element: (
    86→      <ProtectedRoute allowedRoles={['admin']}>
    87→        <AdminLayout />
    88→      </ProtectedRoute>

    90→    children: [

    96→      { path: 'branches', element: <AdminBranchesPage /> },
    97→    ],
    98→  },
    99→
   100→  // === SHIPPER ROUTES ===
   101→  {

   108→    children: [

   111→      { path: 'history', element: <ShipperHistoryPage /> },

   113→  },
   114→
   115→  // 404
   116→  { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
   117→];
   118→
   119→const router = createBrowserRouter(routes);
   120→export default router;
```

```text
    99→    localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(res.data.data));
   100→    return { foodId, user: res.data.data };
   101→  } catch (err) {
   102→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
   103→  }

   105→
   106→export const changePassword = createAsyncThunk('auth/changePassword', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   107→  try {
   108→    await authApi.changePassword(data);
   109→    return true;
   110→  } catch (err) {
   111→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data || { message: 'Đổi mật khẩu thất bại' });
   112→  }
   113→});
   114→
   115→export const fetchWishlist = createAsyncThunk('auth/fetchWishlist', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
   116→  try {
   117→    const res = await authApi.getWishlist();
   118→    return res.data.data;
   119→  } catch (err) {
   120→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
   121→  }
   122→});
   123→
   124→const authSlice = createSlice({
   125→  name: 'auth',
   126→  initialState: {
   127→    user: loadUserFromStorage().user,
   128→    wishlist: [],
   129→    token: loadUserFromStorage().token,
   130→    loading: false,
   131→    error: null,
   132→    isAuthenticated: !!loadUserFromStorage().token,
   133→  },
   134→  reducers: {
   135→    logout: (state) => {
   136→      state.user = null;
   137→      state.token = null;
   138→      state.isAuthenticated = false;
   139→      state.error = null;
   140→      state.wishlist = [];
   141→      localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
   142→      localStorage.removeItem('user');
   143→    },
   144→    clearError: (state) => {
   145→      state.error = null;
   146→    },
   147→    setUser: (state, action) => {
   148→      state.user = action.payload;
   149→      state.isAuthenticated = true;
   150→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   151→    },
   152→  },
   153→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
   154→    // Login
   155→    builder.addCase(login.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   156→      .addCase(login.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   157→        state.loading = false;
   158→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   159→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   160→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   161→      })
   162→      .addCase(login.rejected, (state, action) => {
   163→        state.loading = false;
   164→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Login failed';
   165→      });
   166→
   167→    // Register
   168→    builder.addCase(register.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   169→      .addCase(register.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   170→        state.loading = false;
   171→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   172→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   173→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   174→      })
   175→      .addCase(register.rejected, (state, action) => {
   176→        state.loading = false;
   177→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Registration failed';
   178→      });
   179→
   180→    // RegisterAdmin
   181→    builder.addCase(registerAdmin.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   182→      .addCase(registerAdmin.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   183→        state.loading = false;
   184→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   185→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   186→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   187→        state.error = null;
   188→      })
   189→      .addCase(registerAdmin.rejected, (state, action) => {
   190→        state.loading = false;
   191→        state.error = action.payload;
   192→      });
   193→
   194→    // RegisterShipper
   195→    builder.addCase(registerShipper.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; state.error = null; })
   196→      .addCase(registerShipper.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   197→        state.loading = false;
   198→        state.user = action.payload.user;
   199→        state.token = action.payload.accessToken;
   200→        state.isAuthenticated = true;
   201→        state.error = null;
   202→      })
   203→      .addCase(registerShipper.rejected, (state, action) => {
   204→        state.loading = false;
   205→        state.error = action.payload;
   206→      });
   207→
   208→    // GetMe
   209→    builder.addCase(getMe.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   210→      state.user = action.payload;
   211→      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(action.payload));
   212→    });
   213→
   214→    // Update Profile
   215→    builder.addCase(updateProfile.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   216→      state.user = action.payload;
   217→    });
   218→
   219→    // Remove from wishlist
   220→    builder.addCase(removeFromWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   221→      state.user = action.payload.user;
   222→    });
   223→
   224→    // Change password
   225→    builder.addCase(changePassword.rejected, (state, action) => {
   226→      state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Đổi mật khẩu thất bại';
   227→    });
   228→
   229→    // Fetch wishlist
   230→    builder.addCase(fetchWishlist.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   231→      state.wishlist = action.payload;
   232→      // Also update user.wishlist
   233→      if (state.user) {
   234→        state.user.wishlist = action.payload.map((f) => f._id);
   235→      }
   236→    });
   237→  },
   238→});
   239→
   240→export const { logout, clearError, setUser } = authSlice.actions;
   241→export default authSlice.reducer;
   242→
```

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { foodApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→// Async thunks
     5→export const fetchFoods = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     6→  try {
     7→    const response = await foodApi.getAll(params);
     8→    return response.data;
     9→  } catch (error) {
    10→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    11→  }
    12→});
    13→
    14→export const fetchFoodById = createAsyncThunk('foods/fetchById', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    15→  try {
    16→    const response = await foodApi.getById(id);
    17→    return response.data;
    18→  } catch (error) {
    19→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    20→  }
    21→});
    22→
    23→export const createFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    24→  try {
    25→    const response = await foodApi.create(data);
    26→    return response.data;
    27→  } catch (error) {
    28→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    29→  }
    30→});
    31→
    32→export const updateFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/update', async ({ id, data }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    33→  try {
    34→    const response = await foodApi.update(id, data);
    35→    return response.data;
    36→  } catch (error) {
    37→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    38→  }
    39→});
    40→
    41→export const deleteFood = createAsyncThunk('foods/delete', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    42→  try {
    43→    const response = await foodApi.delete(id);
    44→    return { ...response.data, id };
    45→  } catch (error) {
    46→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    47→  }
    48→});
    49→
    50→const foodsSlice = createSlice({
    51→  name: 'foods',
    52→  initialState: {
    53→    items: [],
    54→    currentFood: null,
    55→    pagination: { currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1, totalItems: 0, limit: 8 },
    56→    loading: false,
    57→    error: null,
    58→    filters: { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' },
    59→  },
    60→  reducers: {
    61→    setFilters: (state, action) => {
    62→      state.filters = { ...state.filters, ...action.payload };
    63→    },
    64→    resetFilters: (state) => {
    65→      state.filters = { search: '', category: 'Tất cả', sort: 'newest' };
    66→    },
    67→    clearCurrentFood: (state) => {
    68→      state.currentFood = null;
    69→    },
    70→  },
    71→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    72→    // Fetch all
    73→    builder
    74→      .addCase(fetchFoods.pending, (state) => {
    75→        state.loading = true;
    76→        state.error = null;
    77→      })
    78→      .addCase(fetchFoods.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    79→        state.loading = false;
    80→        state.items = action.payload.data.foods;
    81→        state.pagination = action.payload.data.pagination;
    82→      })
    83→      .addCase(fetchFoods.rejected, (state, action) => {
    84→        state.loading = false;
    85→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    86→      });
    87→
    88→    // Fetch by ID
    89→    builder
    90→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.pending, (state) => {
    91→        state.loading = true;
    92→        state.error = null;
    93→      })
    94→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    95→        state.loading = false;
    96→        state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
    97→      })
    98→      .addCase(fetchFoodById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    99→        state.loading = false;
   100→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
   101→      });
   102→
   103→    // Create
   104→    builder
   105→      .addCase(createFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   106→        state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
   107→      });
   108→
   109→    // Update
   110→    builder
   111→      .addCase(updateFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   112→        const idx = state.items.findIndex((f) => f._id === action.payload.data._id);
   113→        if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
   114→        if (state.currentFood?._id === action.payload.data._id) {
   115→          state.currentFood = action.payload.data;
   116→        }
   117→      });
   118→
   119→    // Delete
   120→    builder
   121→      .addCase(deleteFood.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
   122→        state.items = state.items.filter((f) => f._id !== action.payload.id);
   123→      });
   124→  },
   125→});
   126→
   127→export const { setFilters, resetFilters, clearCurrentFood } = foodsSlice.actions;
   128→export default foodsSlice.reducer;
   129→
```

```text
     1→import { createSlice } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→
     3→const loadCartFromStorage = () => {
     4→  try {
     5→    const stored = localStorage.getItem('cart');
     6→    return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
     7→  } catch {
     8→    return [];
     9→  }
    10→};
    11→
    12→const saveCartToStorage = (items) => {
    13→  try {
    14→    localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(items));
    15→  } catch {}
    16→};
    17→
    18→const cartSlice = createSlice({
    19→  name: 'cart',
    20→  initialState: {
    21→    items: loadCartFromStorage(),
    22→    coupon: null,
    23→    couponDiscount: 0,
    24→    fulfillmentType: 'delivery',
    25→    selectedBranch: null,
    26→  },
    27→  reducers: {
    28→    addToCart: (state, action) => {
    29→      const { food, quantity = 1, variant, toppings } = action.payload;
    30→      const key = variant || toppings?.length ? `${food._id}-${variant || ''}-${(toppings || []).map((t) => t.name).join(',')}` : food._id;
    31→
    32→      const existing = state.items.find((item) => item.key === key);
    33→      if (existing) {
    34→        existing.quantity += quantity;
    35→      } else {
    36→        state.items.push({
    37→          key,
    38→          _id: food._id,
    39→          name: food.name,
    40→          price: food.price,
    41→          originalPrice: food.originalPrice,
    42→          image: food.image,
    43→          category: food.category,
    44→          variant,
    45→          toppings: toppings || [],
    46→          quantity,
    47→        });
    48→      }
    49→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    50→    },
    51→    removeFromCart: (state, action) => {
    52→      state.items = state.items.filter((item) => item.key !== action.payload);
    53→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    54→    },
    55→    updateQuantity: (state, action) => {
    56→      const { key, quantity } = action.payload;
    57→      const item = state.items.find((i) => i.key === key);
    58→      if (item) {
    59→        if (quantity <= 0) {
    60→          state.items = state.items.filter((i) => i.key !== key);
    61→        } else {
    62→          item.quantity = quantity;
    63→        }
    64→      }
    65→      saveCartToStorage(state.items);
    66→    },
    67→    clearCart: (state) => {
    68→      state.items = [];
    69→      state.coupon = null;
    70→      state.couponDiscount = 0;
    71→      saveCartToStorage([]);
    72→    },
    73→    setCoupon: (state, action) => {
    74→      state.coupon = action.payload.coupon;
    75→      state.couponDiscount = action.payload.discount;
    76→    },
    77→    removeCoupon: (state) => {
    78→      state.coupon = null;
    79→      state.couponDiscount = 0;
    80→    },
    81→    setFulfillmentType: (state, action) => {
    82→      state.fulfillmentType = action.payload;
    83→    },
    84→    setSelectedBranch: (state, action) => {
    85→      state.selectedBranch = action.payload;
    86→    },
    87→  },
    88→});
    89→
    90→export const selectCartItems = (state) => state.cart.items;
    91→export const selectCartTotal = (state) =>
    92→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    93→    const toppingPrice = (item.toppings || []).reduce((tSum, t) => tSum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    94→    return sum + (item.price + toppingPrice) * item.quantity;
    95→  }, 0);
    96→export const selectCartSubtotal = selectCartTotal;
    97→export const selectCartDiscount = (state) => state.cart.couponDiscount;
    98→export const selectCartDeliveryFee = (state) => {
    99→  if (state.cart.fulfillmentType !== 'delivery') return 0;
   100→  const subtotal = selectCartSubtotal(state);
   101→  return subtotal >= 100000 ? 0 : 15000;
   102→};
   103→export const selectCartGrandTotal = (state) =>
   104→  selectCartSubtotal(state) - selectCartDiscount(state) + selectCartDeliveryFee(state);
   105→export const selectCartCount = (state) =>
   106→  state.cart.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
   107→export const selectCoupon = (state) => state.cart.coupon;
   108→export const selectFulfillmentType = (state) => state.cart.fulfillmentType;
   109→export const selectSelectedBranch = (state) => state.cart.selectedBranch;
   110→
   111→export const {
   112→  addToCart,
   113→  removeFromCart,
   114→  updateQuantity,
   115→  clearCart,
   116→  setCoupon,
   117→  removeCoupon,
   118→  setFulfillmentType,
   119→  setSelectedBranch,
   120→} = cartSlice.actions;
   121→
   122→export default cartSlice.reducer;
   123→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    70→    builder.addCase(fetchOrderById.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
    71→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    72→        state.loading = false;
    73→        state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    74→      })
    75→      .addCase(fetchOrderById.rejected, (state, action) => {
    76→        state.loading = false;
    77→        state.error = action.payload?.message;
    78→      });
    79→
    80→    builder.addCase(createOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    81→      state.currentOrder = action.payload;
    82→    });
    83→
    84→    builder.addCase(cancelOrder.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    85→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((o) => o._id === action.payload._id);
    86→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload;
    87→    });
    88→  },
    89→});
    90→
    91→export const { updateOrderLocal } = ordersSlice.actions;
    92→export default ordersSlice.reducer;
    93→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\frontend\src\slices\notificationsSlice.js`

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { notificationApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→export const fetchNotifications = createAsyncThunk('notifications/fetch', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const res = await notificationApi.getAll();
     7→    return res.data.data;
     8→  } catch (err) {
     9→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    10→  }
    11→});
    12→
    13→export const markAsRead = createAsyncThunk('notifications/markRead', async (id, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    await notificationApi.markAsRead(id);
    16→    return id;
    17→  } catch (err) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    19→  }
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const markAllAsRead = createAsyncThunk('notifications/markAllRead', async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    await notificationApi.markAllAsRead();
    25→    return true;
    26→  } catch (err) {
    27→    return rejectWithValue(err.response?.data);
    28→  }
    29→});
    30→
    31→const notificationsSlice = createSlice({
    32→  name: 'notifications',
    33→  initialState: {
    34→    items: [],
    35→    unreadCount: 0,
    36→    loading: false,
    37→  },
    38→  reducers: {
    39→    addNotification: (state, action) => {
    40→      state.items.unshift(action.payload);
    41→      if (!action.payload.isRead) state.unreadCount++;
    42→    },
    43→  },
    44→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    45→    builder.addCase(fetchNotifications.pending, (state) => { state.loading = true; })
    46→      .addCase(fetchNotifications.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    47→        state.loading = false;
    48→        state.items = action.payload.notifications;
    49→        state.unreadCount = action.payload.unreadCount;
    50→      });
    51→
    52→    builder.addCase(markAsRead.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    53→      const notif = state.items.find((n) => n._id === action.payload);
    54→      if (notif && !notif.isRead) {
    55→        notif.isRead = true;
    56→        state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);
    57→      }
    58→    });
    59→
    60→    builder.addCase(markAllAsRead.fulfilled, (state) => {
    61→      state.items.forEach((n) => (n.isRead = true));
    62→      state.unreadCount = 0;
    63→    });
    64→  },
    65→});
    66→
    67→export const { addNotification } = notificationsSlice.actions;
    68→export const selectUnreadCount = (state) => state.notifications.unreadCount;
    69→export default notificationsSlice.reducer;
    70→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
     2→import { bookingApi } from '../api/axiosClient';
     3→
     4→export const fetchBookings = createAsyncThunk('bookings/fetchAll', async (params, { rejectWithValue }) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const response = await bookingApi.getAll(params);
     7→    return response.data;
     8→  } catch (error) {
     9→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    10→  }
    11→});
    12→
    13→export const createBooking = createAsyncThunk('bookings/create', async (data, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    14→  try {
    15→    const response = await bookingApi.create(data);
    16→    return response.data;
    17→  } catch (error) {
    18→    return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    19→  }
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const updateBookingStatus = createAsyncThunk(
    23→  'bookings/updateStatus',
    24→  async ({ id, status }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
    25→    try {
    26→      const response = await bookingApi.updateStatus(id, status);
    27→      return response.data;
    28→    } catch (error) {
    29→      return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data || { message: 'Lỗi kết nối' });
    30→    }
    31→  }
    32→);
    33→
    34→const bookingsSlice = createSlice({
    35→  name: 'bookings',
    36→  initialState: {
    37→    items: [],
    38→    loading: false,
    39→    error: null,
    40→    statusFilter: 'Tất cả',
    41→  },
    42→  reducers: {
    43→    setStatusFilter: (state, action) => {
    44→      state.statusFilter = action.payload;
    45→    },
    46→  },
    47→  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    48→    // Fetch all
    49→    builder
    50→      .addCase(fetchBookings.pending, (state) => {
    51→        state.loading = true;
    52→        state.error = null;
    53→      })
    54→      .addCase(fetchBookings.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    55→        state.loading = false;
    56→        state.items = action.payload.data;
    57→      })
    58→      .addCase(fetchBookings.rejected, (state, action) => {
    59→        state.loading = false;
    60→        state.error = action.payload?.message || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu';
    61→      });
    62→
    63→    // Create
    64→    builder.addCase(createBooking.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    65→      state.items.unshift(action.payload.data);
    66→    });
    67→
    68→    // Update status
    69→    builder.addCase(updateBookingStatus.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
    70→      const idx = state.items.findIndex((b) => b._id === action.payload.data._id);
    71→      if (idx !== -1) state.items[idx] = action.payload.data;
    72→    });
    73→  },
    74→});
    75→
    76→export const { setStatusFilter } = bookingsSlice.actions;
    77→export default bookingsSlice.reducer;
    78→
```

```text
     1→import { forwardRef } from 'react';
     2→import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';
     3→
     4→const variants = {
     5→  primary: 'bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md',
     6→  secondary: 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700',
     7→  outline: 'border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 hover:border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
     8→  ghost: 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:text-stone-400 dark:hover:bg-stone-800',
     9→  danger: 'bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 shadow-sm',
    10→  success: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-sm',
    11→};
    12→
    13→const sizes = {
    14→  sm: 'px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-lg gap-1.5',
    15→  md: 'px-5 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-xl gap-2',
    16→  lg: 'px-6 py-3 text-base rounded-xl gap-2',
    17→  icon: 'p-2 rounded-xl',
    18→};
    19→
    20→const Button = forwardRef(({
    21→  children,
    22→  variant = 'primary',
    23→  size = 'md',
    24→  className,
    25→  disabled,
    26→  loading,
    27→  leftIcon,
    28→  rightIcon,
    29→  ...props
    30→}, ref) => {
    31→  return (
    32→    <button
    33→      ref={ref}
    34→      disabled={disabled || loading}
    35→      className={cn(
    36→        'inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-all duration-200',
    37→        'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed',
    38→        'active:scale-[0.98]',
    39→        variants[variant],
    40→        sizes[size],
    41→        className
    42→      )}
    43→      {...props}
    44→    >
    45→      {loading ? (
    46→        <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    47→          <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
    48→          <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
    49→        </svg>
    50→      ) : leftIcon}
    51→      {children}
    52→      {!loading && rightIcon}
    53→    </button>
    54→  );
    55→});
    56→
    57→Button.displayName = 'Button';
    58→export default Button;
    59→
```

```text
    10→  rightIcon,
    11→  rightElement,
    12→  containerClassName,
    13→  ...props
    14→}, ref) => {
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className={cn('w-full', containerClassName)}>
    17→      {label && (
    18→        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 mb-1.5">
    19→          {label}
    20→        </label>
    21→      )}
    22→      <div className="relative">
    23→        {/* Left icon */}
    24→        {leftIcon && (
    25→          <span className="absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 pointer-events-none flex items-center">
    26→            {leftIcon}
    27→          </span>
    28→        )}
    29→
    30→        {/* Input */}
    31→        <input
    32→          ref={ref}
    33→          className={cn(
    34→            'w-full rounded-xl border bg-white text-stone-800 placeholder:text-stone-400',
    35→            'text-sm transition-all duration-200 outline-none',
    36→            // Padding — icon trái chiếm 44px, icon phải/toggle chiếm 44px
    37→            leftIcon && (rightIcon || rightElement)
    38→              ? 'pl-11 pr-11 py-3'
    39→              : leftIcon
    40→                ? 'pl-11 pr-4 py-3'
    41→                : (rightIcon || rightElement)
    42→                  ? 'pl-4 pr-11 py-3'
    43→                  : 'px-4 py-3',
    44→            // Border & focus — light mode
    45→            error
    46→              ? 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500/20'
    47→              : 'border-stone-200 hover:border-stone-300 focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/20',
    48→            // Border — dark mode
    49→            'dark:border-stone-700 dark:bg-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 dark:hover:border-stone-600 dark:focus:border-primary-500 dark:focus:ring-primary-500/20',
    50→            // Disabled
    51→            'disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-stone-50 dark:disabled:bg-stone-800',
    52→            className
    53→          )}
    54→          {...props}
    55→        />
    56→
    57→        {/* Right icon (static icon) */}
    58→        {rightIcon && (
    59→          <span className="absolute right-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-stone-400 pointer-events-none flex items-center">
    60→            {rightIcon}
    61→          </span>
    62→        )}
    63→
    64→        {/* Right element (interactive — toggle button) */}
    65→        {rightElement && (
    66→          <span className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
    67→            {rightElement}
    68→          </span>
    69→        )}
    70→      </div>
    71→
    72→      {/* Error message */}
    73→      {error && (
    74→        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-red-500 flex items-center gap-1">
    75→          <svg className="w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
    76→            <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-8-5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v4.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4.5A.75.75 0 0110 5zm0 10a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clipRule="evenodd" />
    77→          </svg>
    78→          {error}
    79→        </p>
    80→      )}
    81→
    82→      {/* Helper text */}
    83→      {helper && !error && (
    84→        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-stone-400">{helper}</p>
    85→      )}
    86→    </div>
    87→  );
    88→});
    89→
    90→Input.displayName = 'Input';
    91→export default Input;
    92→
```

```text
     7→export default function Modal({
     8→  isOpen,
     9→  onClose,
    10→  title,
    11→  children,
    12→  size = 'md',
    13→  showClose = true,
    14→  className,
    15→}) {
    16→  const overlayRef = useRef(null);
    17→
    18→  useEffect(() => {
    19→    if (isOpen) {
    20→      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    21→    } else {
    22→      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    23→    }
    24→    return () => { document.body.style.overflow = ''; };
    25→  }, [isOpen]);
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {

    32→    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleEsc);

    41→  };
    42→

    48→        {/* Backdrop */}
    49→        <motion.div
    50→          ref={overlayRef}

    52→          animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
    53→          exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
    54→          transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
    55→          className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm"
    56→          onClick={onClose}
    57→        />
    58→
    59→        {/* Content */}
    60→        <motion.div
    61→          initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 10 }}
    62→          animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
    63→          exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 10 }}
    64→          transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
    65→          className={cn(
    66→            'relative bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden',
    67→            'border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800',
    68→            sizes[size],
    69→            className
    70→          )}
    71→        >
    72→          {/* Header */}
    73→          {(title || showClose) && (
    74→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
    75→              {title && (

    77→                  {title}
    78→                </h2>
    79→              )}
    80→              {showClose && (

    82→                  onClick={onClose}
    83→                  className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 rounded-lg transition-colors"
    84→                >
    85→                  <X className="w-5 h-5" />
    86→                </button>
    87→              )}
    88→            </div>
    89→          )}
    90→
    91→          {/* Body */}
    92→          <div className="overflow-y-auto max-h-[calc(90vh-80px)]">
    93→            {children}
    94→          </div>
    95→        </motion.div>
    96→      </div>
    97→    </AnimatePresence>,
    98→    document.body
```

```text
     1→import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const Pagination = ({ currentPage, totalPages, onPageChange }) => {
     4→  if (totalPages <= 1) return null;
     5→
     6→  const pages = [];
     7→  for (let i = 1; i <= totalPages; i++) {
     8→    if (i === 1 || i === totalPages || (i >= currentPage - 1 && i <= currentPage + 1)) {
     9→      pages.push(i);
    10→    } else if (pages[pages.length - 1] !== '...') {
    11→      pages.push('...');
    12→    }
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 mt-8">
    17→      <button
    18→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
    19→        disabled={currentPage === 1}
    20→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    21→      >
    22→        <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
    23→      </button>
    24→
    25→      {pages.map((page, idx) =>
    26→        page === '...' ? (
    27→          <span key={`ellipsis-${idx}`} className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400">
    28→            ···
    29→          </span>
    30→        ) : (
    31→          <button
    32→            key={page}
    33→            onClick={() => onPageChange(page)}
    34→            className={`w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
    35→              currentPage === page
    36→                ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md shadow-primary-500/30'
    37→                : 'text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100'
    38→            }`}
    39→          >
    40→            {page}
    41→          </button>
    42→        )
    43→      )}
    44→
    45→      <button
    46→        onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}
    47→        disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
    48→        className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200"
    49→      >
    50→        <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
    51→      </button>
    52→    </div>
    53→  );
    54→};
    55→
    56→export default Pagination;
    57→
```

```text
    53→              </div>
    54→              <button
    55→                onClick={onClose}
    56→                className="p-2 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 rounded-lg transition-colors"
    57→              >
    58→                <X className="w-5 h-5" />
    59→              </button>
    60→            </div>
    61→
    62→            {/* Items */}
    63→            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-5 py-4">
    64→              {items.length === 0 ? (
    65→                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center">
    66→                  <ShoppingBag className="w-16 h-16 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700 mb-4" />
    67→                  <p className="text-stone-500 font-medium">Giỏ hàng trống</p>
    68→                  <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm mt-1">Hãy thêm món ăn vào giỏ</p>
    69→                </div>
    70→              ) : (
    71→                <div className="space-y-4">
    72→                  <AnimatePresence>
    73→                    {items.map((item) => (
    74→                      <motion.div
    75→                        key={item.key}
    76→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
    77→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    78→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 50 }}
    79→                        className="flex gap-3 pb-4 border-b border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 last:border-0"
    80→                      >
    81→                        <img
    82→                          src={item.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=80&h=80&fit=crop'}
    83→                          alt={item.name}
    84→                          className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
    85→                        />
    86→                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
    87→                          <h4 className="font-medium text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate text-sm">
    88→                            {item.name}
    89→                          </h4>
    90→                          {item.variant && (
    91→                            <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">{item.variant}</p>
    92→                          )}
    93→                          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
    94→                            <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 text-sm">
    95→                              {formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}
    96→                            </span>
    97→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    98→                              <button
    99→                                onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ key: item.key, quantity: item.quantity - 1 }))}
   100→                                className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
   101→                              >
   102→                                <Minus className="w-3 h-3" />
   103→                              </button>
   104→                              <span className="w-6 text-center font-medium text-sm">{item.quantity}</span>
   105→                              <button
   106→                                onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ key: item.key, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }))}
   107→                                className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-stone-200 dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
   108→                              >
   109→                                <Plus className="w-3 h-3" />
   110→                              </button>
   111→                              <button
   112→                                onClick={() => dispatch(removeFromCart(item.key))}
   113→                                className="p-1.5 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors"
   114→                              >
   115→                                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   116→                              </button>
   117→                            </div>
   118→                          </div>
   119→                        </div>
   120→                      </motion.div>
   121→                    ))}
   122→                  </AnimatePresence>
   123→                </div>
   124→              )}
   125→            </div>
   126→
   127→            {/* Footer */}
   128→            {items.length > 0 && (
   129→              <div className="border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 px-5 py-4">
   130→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
   131→                  <span className="text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">Tổng cộng</span>
   132→                  <span className="text-xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
   133→                    {formatCurrency(total)}
   134→                  </span>
   135→                </div>
   136→                <Link
   137→                  to="/checkout"
   138→                  onClick={onClose}
   139→                  className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center"
   140→                >
   141→                  Đặt hàng ngay
   142→                </Link>
   143→                <Link
   144→                  to="/cart"
   145→                  onClick={onClose}
   146→                  className="btn-ghost w-full py-2 mt-2 justify-center text-sm"
   147→                >
   148→                  Xem giỏ hàng
   149→                </Link>
   150→              </div>
   151→            )}
   152→          </motion.div>
   153→        </>
   154→      )}
   155→    </AnimatePresence>
   156→  );
   157→}
   158→
```

```text
     9→
    10→const schema = yup.object({
    11→  name: yup.string().required('Tên món ăn không được để trống').min(2, 'Tên phải có ít nhất 2 ký tự'),

    18→  description: yup.string().default(''),

    22→
    23→const FoodFormModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, onSubmit, initialData, isLoading }) => {
    24→  const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState('');
    25→  const [imageMode, setImageMode] = useState('url'); // 'url' | 'upload'

    39→      category: '',
    40→      price: '',
    41→      description: '',
    42→      image: '',
    43→      isAvailable: true,
    44→    },
    45→  });
    46→
    47→  const imageValue = watch('image');
    48→
    49→  // Reset form when modal opens/closes or data changes
    50→  useEffect(() => {
    51→    if (isOpen) {
    52→      if (initialData) {
    53→        reset({
    54→          name: initialData.name || '',
    55→          category: initialData.category || '',
    56→          price: initialData.price || '',
    57→          description: initialData.description || '',
    58→          image: initialData.image || '',
    59→          isAvailable: initialData.isAvailable ?? true,

    72→
    73→  const handleImageUrlChange = (url) => {

    77→
    78→  const handleFileUpload = async (e) => {

    81→

   120→            <input {...register('name')} className="input-field" placeholder="VD: Cơm gà xối mỡ" />
   121→            {errors.name && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.name.message}</p>}
   122→          </div>
   123→
   124→          {/* Category */}
   125→          <div>
   126→            <label className="input-label">Danh mục <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>

   136→          {/* Price */}
   137→          <div>
   138→            <label className="input-label">Giá (VNĐ) <span className="text-red-500">*</span></label>

   142→              min="0"
   143→              step="1000"
   144→              className="input-field"
   145→              placeholder="VD: 45000"
   146→            />
   147→            {errors.price && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.price.message}</p>}
   148→          </div>
   149→
   150→          {/* Description */}
   151→          <div>
   152→            <label className="input-label">Mô tả</label>

   159→          </div>
   160→
   161→          {/* Image */}

   173→              >

   176→              <button

   184→              >

   186→              </button>

   189→            {imageMode === 'url' ? (

   193→                onChange={(e) => handleImageUrlChange(e.target.value)}
   194→                className="input-field"
   195→                placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   196→              />
   197→            ) : (

   203→                  className="hidden"

   206→                <label

   223→
   224→            {/* Image preview */}
```

```text
    47→                  <td className="font-semibold text-stone-900">
    48→                    {formatCurrency(food.price)}
    49→                  </td>
    50→                  <td>
    51→                    <AvailabilityBadge isAvailable={food.isAvailable} />
    52→                  </td>
    53→                  <td>
    54→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
    55→                      <button
    56→                        onClick={() => onEdit(food)}
    57→                        className="p-2 text-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    58→                        title="Sửa"
    59→                      >
    60→                        <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    61→                      </button>
    62→                      <button
    63→                        onClick={() => onDelete(food)}
    64→                        className="p-2 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200"
    65→                        title="Xóa"
    66→                      >
    67→                        <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
    68→                      </button>
    69→                    </div>
    70→                  </td>
    71→                </tr>
    72→              );
    73→            })}
    74→          </tbody>
    75→        </table>
    76→      </div>
    77→    </div>
    78→  );
    79→};
    80→
    81→export default FoodTable;
    82→
```

```text
     1→import { CheckCircle, Clock, XCircle, CheckCheck } from 'lucide-react';
     2→
     3→const STATUS_TRANSITIONS = {
     4→  pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
     5→  confirmed: ['done', 'cancelled'],
     6→  done: [],
     7→  cancelled: [],
     8→};
     9→
    10→const ACTION_CONFIG = {
    11→  confirmed: {
    12→    label: 'Xác nhận',
    13→    icon: CheckCircle,
    14→    className: 'btn-primary',
    15→    nextStatus: 'confirmed',
    16→  },
    17→  done: {
    18→    label: 'Hoàn thành',
    19→    icon: CheckCheck,
    20→    className: 'bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600',
    21→    nextStatus: 'done',
    22→  },
    23→  cancelled: {
    24→    label: 'Hủy',
    25→    icon: XCircle,
    26→    className: 'btn-danger',
    27→    nextStatus: 'cancelled',
    28→  },
    29→};
    30→
    31→const BookingActions = ({ booking, onUpdateStatus }) => {
    32→  const transitions = STATUS_TRANSITIONS[booking.status] || [];
    33→
    34→  if (transitions.length === 0) return null;
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    38→      {transitions.map((nextStatus) => {
    39→        const config = ACTION_CONFIG[nextStatus];
    40→        if (!config) return null;
    41→        const Icon = config.icon;
    42→
    43→        return (
    44→          <button
    45→            key={nextStatus}
    46→            onClick={() => onUpdateStatus(booking._id, nextStatus)}
    47→            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-[1.02] ${config.className}`}
    48→          >
    49→            <Icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
    50→            {config.label}
    51→          </button>
    52→        );
    53→      })}
    54→    </div>
    55→  );
    56→};
    57→
    58→export default BookingActions;
    59→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    20→    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
    21→      <div>

    25→        {trend && (

    39→const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }) => {

   243→                      paddingAngle={3}
   244→                      dataKey="value"
   245→                    >
   246→                      {categoryData.map((_, i) => (
   247→                        <Cell key={i} fill={CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length]} />
   248→                      ))}
   249→                    </Pie>
   250→                    <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
   251→                  </PieChart>
   252→                </ResponsiveContainer>
   253→                <div className="space-y-2 mt-2">
   254→                  {categoryData.map((item, i) => (
   255→                    <div key={item.name || i} className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
   256→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   257→                        <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length] }} />
   258→                        <span className="text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 truncate">{item.name}</span>
   259→                      </div>
   260→                      <span className="font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">{item.value}</span>
   261→                    </div>
   262→                  ))}
   263→                </div>
   264→              </>
   265→            ) : (
   266→              <div className="h-[280px] flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400 text-sm">Chưa có dữ liệu</div>
   267→            )}
   268→          </div>
   269→        </div>
   270→
   271→        {/* Recent Orders */}
   272→        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
   273→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 pb-3">
   274→            <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Đơn hàng gần đây</h3>
   275→            <Link to="/admin/orders" className="text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1">
   276→              Xem tất cả <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   277→            </Link>
   278→          </div>
   279→          {recentOrders.length > 0 ? (
   280→            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   281→              <table className="admin-table">
   282→                <thead>
   283→                  <tr>
   284→                    <th>Mã đơn</th>
   285→                    <th>Khách hàng</th>
   286→                    <th>Tổng tiền</th>
   287→                    <th>Trạng thái</th>
   288→                    <th>Ngày đặt</th>
   289→                  </tr>
   290→                </thead>
   291→                <tbody>
   292→                  {recentOrders.map((order) => (
   293→                    <tr key={order._id}>
   294→                      <td className="font-mono text-xs">{order.orderCode}</td>
   295→                      <td className="text-sm">{order.customerInfo?.name || order.customer?.fullName || 'Khách'}</td>
   296→                      <td className="font-semibold text-primary-600 text-sm">{formatCurrency(order.total)}</td>
   297→                      <td><Badge variant={getStatusVariant(order.status)} dot>{getStatusLabel(order.status)}</Badge></td>
   298→                      <td className="text-xs text-stone-400">{formatDateTime(order.createdAt)}</td>
   299→                    </tr>
   300→                  ))}
   301→                </tbody>
   302→              </table>
   303→            </div>
   304→          ) : (
   305→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-400 text-center py-12">Chưa có đơn hàng nào</p>
   306→          )}
   307→        </div>
   308→      </motion.div>
   309→    </div>
   310→  );
   311→}
   312→
   313→const getStatusVariant = (status) => ({
   314→  pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary',
   315→  delivering: 'secondary', done: 'success', cancelled: 'danger',
   316→}[status] || 'gray');
   317→
   318→const getStatusLabel = (status) => ({
   319→  pending: 'Chờ xác nhận', confirmed: 'Đã xác nhận', preparing: 'Đang chuẩn bị',
   320→  delivering: 'Đang giao', done: 'Hoàn thành', cancelled: 'Đã hủy',
   321→}[status] || status);
   322→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    13→export default function AdminOrdersPage() {

    31→        status: statusFilter || undefined,
    32→        search: search || undefined,
    33→        page,

    38→    } catch (err) {

    40→    } finally {
    41→      setLoading(false);
    42→    }
    43→  };
    44→

    78→    { value: 'preparing', label: 'Đang chuẩn bị' },
    79→    { value: 'delivering', label: 'Đang giao' },

    81→    { value: 'cancelled', label: 'Đã hủy' },

    83→
    84→  const statusVariant = (s) => ({
    85→    pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', preparing: 'primary',

    88→
    89→  return (

   100→            <input

   125→        {/* Table */}

   129→              <tr>

   131→                <th>Khách hàng</th>
   132→                <th>Địa chỉ</th>

   134→                <th>Trạng thái</th>
   135→                <th>Shipper</th>
   136→                <th>Thao tác</th>
   137→              </tr>
   138→            </thead>
   139→            <tbody>
   140→              {loading ? (

   145→                </tr>

   154→                    <td className="max-w-[200px] truncate text-sm">

   167→                    </td>
   168→                    <td>

   197→                    onClick={() => handleStatusChange(selectedOrder._id, s)}
   198→                    disabled={selectedOrder.status === s}

   200→                    {getStatusLabel(s)}
   201→                  </Button>
   202→                ))}
   203→                <Button
   204→                  size="sm"
   205→                  variant="danger"
   206→                  onClick={() => handleStatusChange(selectedOrder._id, 'cancelled')}
   207→                  disabled={['done', 'cancelled'].includes(selectedOrder.status)}
   208→                >

   231→              </div>

   233→
   234→            {/* Items */}
   235→            <div>

   269→                {selectedOrder.note && <p><span className="text-stone-400">Ghi chú:</span> {selectedOrder.note}</p>}
```

```text
    20→  const { register, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();

    22→  useEffect(() => { loadBranches(); }, []);
    23→
    24→  const loadBranches = async () => {
    25→    setLoading(true);
    26→    try {
    27→      const res = await branchApi.getAllAdmin();
    28→      setBranches(res.data.data || []);
    29→    } catch { toast.error('Không thể tải danh sách chi nhánh'); }
    30→    finally { setLoading(false); }
    31→  };
    32→
    33→  const openCreate = () => {
    34→    setEditBranch(null);
    35→    reset({ name: '', address: '', phone: '', openHours: '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: true });
    36→    setIsModalOpen(true);
    37→  };
    38→
    39→  const openEdit = (b) => {
    40→    setEditBranch(b);
    41→    reset({ name: b.name, address: b.address, phone: b.phone || '', openHours: b.openHours || '08:00 - 22:00', isActive: b.isActive });
    42→    setIsModalOpen(true);
    43→  };
    44→
    45→  const onSubmit = async (data) => {
    46→    setIsSubmitting(true);
    47→    try {
    48→      if (editBranch) {
    49→        await branchApi.update(editBranch._id, data);
    50→        toast.success('Cập nhật chi nhánh thành công');
    51→      } else {
    52→        await branchApi.create(data);
    53→        toast.success('Tạo chi nhánh thành công');
    54→      }
    55→      setIsModalOpen(false);
    56→      loadBranches();
    57→    } catch (err) { toast.error(err?.response?.data?.message || 'Thao tác thất bại'); }
    58→    finally { setIsSubmitting(false); }
    59→  };
    60→
    61→  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    62→    try {
    63→      await branchApi.delete(id);
    64→      setBranches((prev) => prev.filter((b) => b._id !== id));
    65→      toast.success('Xóa thành công');
    66→    } catch { toast.error('Xóa thất bại'); }
    67→  };
    68→
    69→  return (

    76→          </div>
    77→          <Button leftIcon={<Plus className="w-4 h-4" />} onClick={openCreate}>Thêm chi nhánh</Button>
    78→        </div>
    79→
    80→        {/* Table */}
    81→        <div className="card overflow-hidden">
    82→          <table className="admin-table">
    83→            <thead>

    85→                <th>Tên chi nhánh</th>
    86→                <th>Địa chỉ</th>
    87→                <th>SĐT</th>
    88→                <th>Giờ mở cửa</th>
    89→                <th>Trạng thái</th>
    90→                <th>Thao tác</th>
    91→              </tr>
    92→            </thead>
    93→            <tbody>
    94→              {loading ? (
    95→                Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonTableRow key={i} cols={6} />)
    96→              ) : branches.length === 0 ? (
    97→                <tr><td colSpan={6} className="text-center py-12 text-stone-400">Chưa có chi nhánh nào</td></tr>
    98→              ) : branches.map((b) => (
    99→                <tr key={b._id}>
   100→                  <td>
   101→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   102→                      <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
   103→                        <MapPin className="w-4 h-4 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400" />
   104→                      </div>
   105→                      <span className="font-medium">{b.name}</span>
   106→                    </div>
   107→                  </td>
   108→                  <td className="text-sm max-w-[250px] truncate">{b.address}</td>
   109→                  <td className="text-sm">{b.phone || '-'}</td>
   110→                  <td className="text-sm">{b.openHours || '-'}</td>
   111→                  <td>
   112→                    <Badge variant={b.isActive ? 'success' : 'danger'} dot>
```

```text
    17→export default function HomePage() {

    35→  // Debounced search
```
