```text
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    dispatch(fetchFoods({ ...filters, page, limit: PAGE_SIZE }));
    46→  }, [filters, page, dispatch]);
    47→
    48→  const handleCategoryChange = (cat) => {
    49→    dispatch(setFilters({ category: cat === 'Tất cả' ? '' : cat }));
    50→    setPage(1);
    51→  };
    52→
    53→  const handleSortChange = (sort) => {
    54→    dispatch(setFilters({ sort }));
    55→    setPage(1);
    56→  };
    57→
    58→  const handleAddToCart = (food, e) => {
    59→    e.preventDefault();
    60→    e.stopPropagation();
    61→    dispatch(addToCart({ food }));
    62→  };
    63→
    64→  const toggleWishlist = (foodId, e) => {
    65→    e.preventDefault();
    66→    e.stopPropagation();
    67→    setWishlist((prev) => prev.includes(foodId) ? prev.filter((id) => id !== foodId) : [...prev, foodId]);
    68→  };
    69→
    70→  const categoryIcons = {
    71→    'Món chính': <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />,
    72→    'Nước uống': <Coffee className="w-6 h-6" />,
    73→    'Tráng miệng': <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />,
    74→    'Khai vị': <Flame className="w-6 h-6" />,
    75→    'Món gà': <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />,
    76→  };
    77→
    78→  const promoCoupons = [
    79→    { code: 'WELCOME50', desc: 'Giảm 50K cho đơn từ 100K', color: 'from-primary-500 to-orange-400' },
    80→    { code: 'GIAM10', desc: 'Giảm 10% tối đa 30K', color: 'from-secondary-500 to-emerald-400' },
    81→    { code: 'FREESHIP', desc: 'Miễn phí giao hàng', color: 'from-amber-500 to-yellow-400' },
    82→  ];
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <div>
    86→      {/* Hero Section */}
    87→      <section className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-900 via-primary-900 to-stone-900 text-white">
    88→        <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-30">
    89→          <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{
    90→            backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, #f97316 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, #f59e0b 0%, transparent 40%)',
    91→          }} />
    92→        </div>
    93→        <div className="relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-20 md:py-28">
    94→          <div className="max-w-2xl">
    95→            <motion.div
    96→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
    97→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    98→              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-amber-300 mb-6"
    99→            >
   100→              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
   101→              Ưu đãi hôm nay - Giảm đến 20%
   102→            </motion.div>
   103→            <motion.h1
   104→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   105→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   106→              transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
   107→              className="font-display text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight"
   108→            >
   109→              Thưởng thức món ăn
   110→              <span className="block gradient-text">đậm chất Việt</span>
   111→            </motion.h1>
   112→            <motion.p
   113→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   114→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   115→              transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
   116→              className="text-lg text-stone-300 mb-8"
   117→            >
   118→              Hàng trăm món ngon từ nhà hàng của chúng tôi. Đặt hàng dễ dàng, giao tận nơi.
   119→            </motion.p>
   120→
   121→            {/* Search bar */}
   122→            <motion.div
   123→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   124→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   125→              transition={{ delay: 0.3 }}
   126→              className="relative max-w-lg"
   127→            >
   128→              <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-stone-400" />
   129→              <input
   130→                type="text"
   131→                value={searchInput}
   132→                onChange={(e) => setSearchInput(e.target.value)}
   133→                placeholder="Tìm món ăn bạn yêu thích..."
   134→                className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/20 rounded-2xl text-white placeholder-stone-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 focus:border-primary-500/50 transition-all"
   135→              />
   136→            </motion.div>
   137→
   138→            {/* Quick stats */}
   139→            <motion.div
   140→              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   141→              animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   142→              transition={{ delay: 0.5 }}
   143→              className="flex items-center gap-8 mt-8 text-sm text-stone-400"
   144→            >
   145→              {[
   146→                { icon: <Truck className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Giao nhanh 30 phút' },
   147→                { icon: <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Thực phẩm an toàn' },
   148→                { icon: <Star className="w-4 h-4" />, text: 'Đánh giá 4.9★' },
   149→              ].map((item, idx) => (
   150→                <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2">
   151→                  {item.icon}
   152→                  <span>{item.text}</span>
   153→                </div>
   154→              ))}
   155→            </motion.div>
   156→          </div>
   157→        </div>
   158→        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0">
   159→          <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 60" fill="none"><path d="M0 60L60 54C120 48 240 36 360 30C480 24 600 24 720 27C840 30 960 36 1080 39C1200 42 1320 42 1380 42L1440 42V60H0Z" fill="#fafaf9"/></svg>
   160→        </div>
   161→      </section>
   162→
   163→      {/* Promo Banner */}
   164→      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 -mt-6 relative z-10">
   165→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   166→          {promoCoupons.map((promo, idx) => (
   167→            <motion.div
   168→              key={idx}
   169→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   170→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   171→              transition={{ delay: idx * 0.1 }}
   172→              className={cn(
   173→                'p-4 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-r text-white shadow-lg cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow',
   174→                promo.color
   175→              )}
   176→            >
   177→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   178→                <div>
   179→                  <p className="text-xs opacity-80 mb-1">Mã giảm giá</p>
   180→                  <p className="font-bold font-mono text-lg">{promo.code}</p>
   181→                  <p className="text-xs opacity-80 mt-1">{promo.desc}</p>
   182→                </div>
   183→                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white/20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
   184→                  <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />
   185→                </div>
   186→              </div>
   187→            </motion.div>
   188→          ))}
   189→        </div>
   190→      </section>
   191→
   192→      {/* Categories */}
   193→      <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
   194→        <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-6">Danh mục</h2>
   195→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
   196→          {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat, idx) => (
   197→            <motion.button
   198→              key={cat}
   199→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   200→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   201→              transition={{ delay: idx * 0.05 }}
   202→              onClick={() => handleCategoryChange(cat)}
   203→              className={cn(
   204→                'flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-5 rounded-2xl border-2 transition-all duration-200',
   205→                filters.category === cat
   206→                  ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400'
   207→                  : 'border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 hover:border-primary-300 dark:hover:border-primary-600 hover:bg-stone-50 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400'
   208→              )}
   209→            >
   210→              <div className={cn(
   211→                'w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center',
   212→                filters.category === cat ? 'bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30' : 'bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800'
   213→              )}>
   214→                {categoryIcons[cat] || <ChefHat className="w-6 h-6" />}
   215→              </div>
   216→              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center">{cat}</span>
   217→            </motion.button>
   218→          ))}
   219→        </div>
   220→      </section>
   221→
   222→      {/* Featured Foods */}
   223→      {featuredFoods.length > 0 && !filters.search && filters.category === '' && (
   224→        <section className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pb-12">
   225→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   226→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   227→              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-amber-400 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
   228→                <Flame className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
   229→              </div>
   230→              <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">
   231→                Món bán chạy
   232→              </h2>
   233→            </div>
   234→            <Link to="/?sort=bestseller" className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium">
   235→              Xem tất cả <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   236→            </Link>
   237→          </div>
   238→          <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 scrollbar-hide -mx-4 px-4">
   239→            {featuredFoods.map((food, idx) => (
   240→              <motion.div
   241→                key={food._id}
   242→                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
   243→                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
   244→                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.08 }}
   245→                className="flex-shrink-0 w-56"
   246→              >
   247→                <Link to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card overflow-hidden group block">
   248→                  <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
   249→                    <img
   250→                      src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=300&h=200&fit=crop'}
   251→                      alt={food.name}
   252→                      className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
   253→                    />
   254→                    <button
   255→                      onClick={(e) => toggleWishlist(food._id, e)}
   256→                      className={cn(
   257→                        'absolute top-2 right-2 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all',
   258→                        wishlist.includes(food._id) ? 'bg-red-500 text-white' : 'bg-white/80 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-500'
   259→                      )}
   260→                    >
   261→                      <Heart className={cn('w-4 h-4', wishlist.includes(food._id) && 'fill-current')} />
   262→                    </button>
   263→                    {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
   264→                      <div className="absolute top-2 left-2">
   265→                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg">-{food.discountPercent}%</span>
   266→                      </div>
   267→                    )}
   268→                  </div>
   269→                  <div className="p-3">
   270→                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 text-sm truncate">{food.name}</h3>
   271→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
   272→                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
   273→                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-500">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
   274→                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">• {food.soldCount || 0} đã bán</span>
   275→                    </div>
   276→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
   277→                      <div>
   278→                        {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
   279→                          <span className="text-[10px] text-stone-400 line-through">{formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}</span>
   280→                        )}
   281→                        <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 text-sm ml-1">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
   282→                      </div>
   283→                      <button
   284→                        onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
   285→                        className="w-7 h-7 bg-primary-500 hover:bg-primary-600 text-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-colors"
   286→                      >
   287→                        <ShoppingCart className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   288→                      </button>
   289→                    </div>
   290→                  </div>
   291→                </Link>
   292→              </motion.div>
   293→            ))}
   294→          </div>
   295→        </section>
   296→      )}
   297→
   298→      {/* All Foods */}
   299→      <section id="menu" className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pb-16">
   300→        {/* Header + Filter Bar */}
   301→        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-6">
   302→          <div>
   303→            <h2 className="font-display text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Thực đơn</h2>
   304→            <p className="text-sm text-stone-500">{pagination.totalItems || items.length} món có sẵn</p>
   305→          </div>
   306→
   307→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   308→            {/* Sort */}
   309→            <select
   310→              value={filters.sort}
   311→              onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}
   312→              className="px-3 py-2 bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 rounded-xl text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/30"
   313→            >
   314→              {SORT_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
   315→                <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
   316→              ))}
   317→            </select>
   318→
   319→            {/* View mode */}
   320→            <div className="flex bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
   321→              <button
   322→                onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
   323→                className={cn('p-2 transition-colors', viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400')}
   324→              >
   325→                <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
   326→              </button>
   327→              <button
   328→                onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
   329→                className={cn('p-2 transition-colors', viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600' : 'text-stone-400')}
   330→              >
   331→                <List className="w-4 h-4" />
   332→              </button>
   333→            </div>
   334→          </div>
   335→        </div>
   336→
   337→        {/* Category pills */}
   338→        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
   339→          <button
   340→            onClick={() => handleCategoryChange('Tất cả')}
   341→            className={cn(
   342→              'px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all',
   343→              !filters.category ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
   344→            )}
   345→          >
   346→            Tất cả
   347→          </button>
   348→          {CATEGORIES.filter((c) => c !== 'Tất cả').map((cat) => (
   349→            <button
   350→              key={cat}
   351→              onClick={() => handleCategoryChange(cat)}
   352→              className={cn(
   353→                'px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all',
   354→                filters.category === cat
   355→                  ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
   356→                  : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
   357→              )}
   358→            >
   359→              {cat}
   360→            </button>
   361→          ))}
   362→        </div>
   363→
   364→        {/* Loading */}
   365→        {loading && (
   366→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
   367→            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <SkeletonCard key={i} />)}
   368→          </div>
   369→        )}
   370→
   371→        {/* Grid view */}
   372→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'grid' && (
   373→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
   374→            {items.map((food, idx) => (
   375→              <motion.div
   376→                key={food._id}
   377→                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   378→                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   379→                transition={{ delay: idx * 0.03 }}
   380→              >
   381→                <Link to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card overflow-hidden group block h-full">
   382→                  <div className="relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden">
   383→                    <img
   384→                      src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop'}
   385→                      alt={food.name}
   386→                      className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
   387→                      loading="lazy"
   388→                    />
   389→                    {/* Wishlist */}
   390→                    <button
   391→                      onClick={(e) => toggleWishlist(food._id, e)}
   392→                      className={cn(
   393→                        'absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all backdrop-blur-sm',
   394→                        wishlist.includes(food._id) ? 'bg-red-500 text-white shadow-lg' : 'bg-white/80 text-stone-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-white'
   395→                      )}
   396→                    >
   397→                      <Heart className={cn('w-4 h-4', wishlist.includes(food._id) && 'fill-current')} />
   398→                    </button>
   399→
   400→                    {/* Badges */}
   401→                    <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex gap-2">
   402→                      {food.discountPercent > 0 && (
   403→                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm">
   404→                          -{food.discountPercent}%
   405→                        </span>
   406→                      )}
   407→                      {food.isFeatured && (
   408→                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-amber-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1">
   409→                          <Flame className="w-3 h-3" /> Hot
   410→                        </span>
   411→                      )}
   412→                    </div>
   413→
   414→                    {/* Quick add overlay */}
   415→                    <div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent p-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   416→                      <button
   417→                        onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
   418→                        className="w-full py-2 bg-white/95 hover:bg-white text-stone-900 font-medium text-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 backdrop-blur-sm transition-colors"
   419→                      >
   420→                        <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
   421→                        Thêm vào giỏ
   422→                      </button>
   423→                    </div>
   424→                  </div>
   425→
   426→                  <div className="p-4">
   427→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   428→                      <span className="badge-primary text-[10px]">{food.category}</span>
   429→                      {!food.isAvailable && <span className="badge-danger text-[10px]">Hết hàng</span>}
   430→                    </div>
   431→                    <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-1 line-clamp-1">
   432→                      {food.name}
   433→                    </h3>
   434→                    <p className="text-stone-500 text-sm mb-3 line-clamp-2 leading-relaxed">
   435→                      {food.description || 'Món ăn ngon miệng'}
   436→                    </p>
   437→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">
   438→                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
   439→                      <span className="text-xs font-medium text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
   440→                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400">({food.ratingCount || 0})</span>
   441→                      <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 ml-1">• {food.soldCount || 0} đã bán</span>
   442→                    </div>
   443→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   444→                      <div>
   445→                        {food.originalPrice > food.price && (
   446→                          <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 line-through mr-1">
   447→                            {formatCurrency(food.originalPrice)}
   448→                          </span>
   449→                        )}
   450→                        <span className="font-bold text-lg text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
   451→                          {formatCurrency(food.price)}
   452→                        </span>
   453→                      </div>
   454→                    </div>
   455→                  </div>
   456→                </Link>
   457→              </motion.div>
   458→            ))}
   459→          </div>
   460→        )}
   461→
   462→        {/* List view */}
   463→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && viewMode === 'list' && (
   464→          <div className="space-y-3">
   465→            {items.map((food) => (
   466→              <Link key={food._id} to={`/foods/${food._id}`} className="card p-4 flex items-center gap-4 group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
   467→                <img
   468→                  src={food.image || 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=80&h=80&fit=crop'}
   469→                  alt={food.name}
   470→                  className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover flex-shrink-0"
   471→                />
   472→                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   473→                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 truncate">{food.name}</h3>
   474→                  <span className="badge-primary text-[10px] mt-1">{food.category}</span>
   475→                </div>
   476→                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 flex-shrink-0">
   477→                  <div className="text-right">
   478→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   479→                      <Star className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
   480→                      <span className="text-xs font-medium">{food.ratingAverage?.toFixed(1) || '5.0'}</span>
   481→                    </div>
   482→                    <span className="font-bold text-primary-600">{formatCurrency(food.price)}</span>
   483→                  </div>
   484→                  <button
   485→                    onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(food, e)}
   486→                    className="w-9 h-9 bg-primary-500 hover:bg-primary-600 text-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-colors"
   487→                  >
   488→                    <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
   489→                  </button>
   490→                </div>
   491→              </Link>
   492→            ))}
   493→          </div>
   494→        )}
   495→
   496→        {/* Empty state */}
   497→        {!loading && items.length === 0 && (
   498→          <div className="card p-16 text-center">
   499→            <ChefHat className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-stone-200 dark:text-stone-700" />
   500→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 mb-2">
   501→              {filters.search || filters.category ? 'Không tìm thấy món phù hợp' : 'Chưa có món ăn nào'}
   502→            </h3>
   503→            <p className="text-stone-400 text-sm">
   504→              {filters.search || filters.category ? 'Thử thay đổi bộ lọc' : ' Quay lại sau để xem thực đơn mới'}
   505→            </p>
   506→          </div>
   507→        )}
   508→
   509→        {/* Pagination */}
   510→        {!loading && items.length > 0 && pagination.totalPages > 1 && (
   511→          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mt-8">
   512→            {Array.from({ length: pagination.totalPages }).map((_, i) => (
   513→              <button
   514→                key={i}
   515→                onClick={() => setPage(i + 1)}
   516→                className={cn(
   517→                  'w-10 h-10 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all',
   518→                  pagination.currentPage === i + 1
   519→                    ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-md'
   520→                    : 'bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50'
   521→                )}
   522→              >
   523→                {i + 1}
   524→              </button>
   525→            ))}
   526→          </div>
   527→        )}
   528→      </section>
   529→    </div>
   530→  );
   531→}
   532→
```

```text
   112→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
   113→                    >
   114→                      <Minus className="w-4 h-4" />
   115→                    </button>
   116→                    <span className="w-8 text-center font-bold text-sm">{item.quantity}</span>

   118→                      onClick={() => dispatch(updateQuantity({ key: item.key, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }))}
   119→                      className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors"
   120→                    >
   121→                      <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   122→                    </button>
   123→                  </div>
   124→                  <button
   125→                    onClick={() => {
   126→                      dispatch(removeFromCart(item.key));
   127→                      toast.success(`Đã xóa "${item.name}"`);

   129→                    className="p-2 text-stone-300 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/20 rounded-lg transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
   130→                  >
   131→                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   132→                  </button>
   133→                </motion.div>
   134→              ))}
   135→            </AnimatePresence>
   136→          </div>
   137→
   138→          {/* Summary */}
   139→          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
   140→            <div className="card p-6 sticky top-24 space-y-4">
   141→              <h3 className="font-display font-semibold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tóm tắt đơn hàng</h3>
   142→
   143→              <div className="space-y-2">
   144→                {cartItems.map((item) => (
   145→                  <div key={item.key} className="flex justify-between text-sm">

   147→                      {item.name} × {item.quantity}
   148→                      {item.toppings?.length > 0 && <span className="text-xs text-stone-400 ml-1">(+{item.toppings.length} topping)</span>}
   149→                    </span>
   150→                    <span className="text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300 font-medium ml-2">
   151→                      {formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}
   152→                    </span>
   153→                  </div>
   154→                ))}
   155→              </div>
   156→
   157→              <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-4 space-y-3">
   158→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   159→                  <span className="text-stone-500">Tạm tính</span>
   160→                  <span className="font-medium">{formatCurrency(subtotal)}</span>
   161→                </div>
   162→
   163→                {discount > 0 && (
   164→                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-emerald-600">
   165→                    <span>Giảm giá</span>
   166→                    <span className="font-semibold">-{formatCurrency(discount)}</span>
   167→                  </div>
   168→                )}
   169→
   170→                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
   171→                  <span className="text-stone-500">Phí giao hàng</span>
   172→                  <span className={deliveryFee === 0 ? 'text-emerald-600 font-semibold' : ''}>
   173→                    {deliveryFee === 0 ? 'Miễn phí' : formatCurrency(deliveryFee)}
   174→                  </span>
   175→                </div>
   176→
   177→                {subtotal < 100000 && (
   178→                  <p className="text-xs text-stone-400">Mua thêm {formatCurrency(100000 - subtotal)} để được miễn phí giao hàng</p>
   179→                )}
   180→
   181→                <div className="border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 pt-3">
   182→                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   183→                    <span className="font-semibold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100">Tổng cộng</span>
   184→                    <span className="text-2xl font-display font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
   185→                      {formatCurrency(grandTotal)}
   186→                    </span>
   187→                  </div>
   188→                </div>
   189→              </div>
   190→
   191→              <Link
   192→                to="/checkout"
   193→                className="btn-primary w-full py-3 text-base justify-center mt-2"
   194→              >
   195→                Đặt món ngay <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   196→              </Link>
   197→              <Link to="/" className="btn-ghost w-full justify-center text-sm">
   198→                <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Tiếp tục chọn món
   199→              </Link>
   200→            </div>
   201→          </div>
   202→        </div>
   203→      </div>
   204→    </div>
   205→  );
   206→}
   207→
```

## 4. Errors and Fixes

No errors were encountered during this read-only exploration task. The task was purely file reading with no modifications. The system noted one file not found (`backend/src/models/Order.model.js` which genuinely does not exist in the codebase).

**Potential codebase issues noticed during reading (not fixed since this was read-only):**

1. **`backend/src/routes/admin.routes.js`** — `GET /api/admin/branches` is NOT defined, but `branch.routes.js` has `GET /branches/admin/list` → inconsistency between admin routes and branch routes for branch admin list endpoint
2. **`frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js`** — imports `bookingApi` from `axiosClient` but `axiosClient` only exports: authApi, foodApi, orderApi, reviewApi, couponApi, branchApi, notificationApi, adminApi, uploadApi — NO `bookingApi`. This would cause a runtime error.
3. **`frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx`** — uses `bookingApi.getAll`, `bookingApi.create`, `bookingApi.updateStatus` which don't exist
4. **Hardcoded secret keys** in `auth.controller.js`: `ADMIN_SECRET = 'ADMINNHAHANGVIET'` and `SHIPPER_SECRET = 'SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET'` are security concerns
5. **In-memory rate limiter** in `rateLimiter.middleware.js` won't work across multiple server instances

```text
   123→                      <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300">
   124→                        {formatCurrency((item.price + (item.toppings || []).reduce((s, t) => s + (t.price || 0), 0)) * item.quantity)}
   125→                      </span>
   126→                    </div>
   127→                  ))}
   128→                  {order.items?.length > 3 && (
   129→                    <p className="text-xs text-stone-400 pl-13">+{order.items.length - 3} món khác</p>
   130→                  )}
   131→                </div>
   132→
   133→                {/* Footer */}
   134→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800">
   135→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-500">
   136→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'delivery' && (
   137→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   138→                        <MapPin className="w-4 h-4" /> Giao hàng
   139→                      </span>
   140→                    )}
   141→                    {order.fulfillmentType === 'pickup' && (
   142→                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">📍 Tự lấy</span>
   143→                    )}
   144→                  </div>
   145→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   146→                    <div className="text-right">
   147→                      {order.discount > 0 && (
   148→                        <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 mr-2">
   149→                          -{formatCurrency(order.discount)}
   150→                        </span>
   151→                      )}
   152→                      <span className="font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400">
   153→                        {formatCurrency(order.total)}
   154→                      </span>
   155→                    </div>
   156→                    <Link
   157→                      to={`/orders/${order._id}`}
   158→                      className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium"
   159→                    >
   160→                      Chi tiết <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   161→                    </Link>
   162→                  </div>
   163→                </div>
   164→              </motion.div>
   165→            ))}
   166→          </div>
   167→        )}
   168→      </motion.div>
   169→    </div>
   170→  );
   171→}
   172→
```

## 2. Cong Nghe Su Dung

### Backend
- **Runtime:** Node.js
- **Framework:** Express.js 4.21.2
- **Database:** MongoDB + Mongoose ODM 8.9.4
- **Authentication:** JWT (access token 15 phut, refresh token 7 ngay) + bcryptjs
- **Real-time:** Socket.io 4.8.1
- **Security:** Helmet 8.0.0, custom in-memory rate limiter, CORS (dynamic origins)
- **Validation:** Zod 3.24.1
- **File Upload:** Multer 1.4.5-lts.1 (disk storage, 5MB limit, image only)
- **Logging:** Winston
- **Dev:** nodemon 3.1.9
- **Architecture:** MVC pattern

### Frontend
- **Framework:** React 18.3.1
- **Build:** Vite 6.0.5
- **State Management:** Redux Toolkit 2.3.0
- **Routing:** React Router DOM 6.28.1 (createBrowserRouter)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 3.4.16 + custom theme (primary orange-500, secondary emerald-500, accent amber-500)
- **Animations:** Framer Motion 11.15.0
- **Forms:** React Hook Form 7.54.2 + Yup 1.4.0
- **HTTP:** Axios 1.7.9 (interceptors: auto token attach, auto refresh)
- **Charts:** Recharts 2.15.0
- **Icons:** Lucide React 0.468.0
- **Toasts:** React Hot Toast 2.4.1
- **Real-time:** Socket.io-client 4.8.1

## 3. Tinh Nang Ung Dung

### 3.1. Nguoi Dung (Khach Hang)
- **Dang ky / Dang nhap** voi email + mat khau (co the chi phi giao hang)
- **Dang ky Admin** (can ma bi mat: `ADMINNHAHANGVIET`)
- **Dang ky Shipper** (can ma bi mat: `SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET`)
- **Trang chu** voi hero, banner khuyen mai, danh muc, danh sach mon an (grid/list)
- **Tim kiem & loc** theo ten, danh muc, gia, sap xep
- **Chi tiet mon an** voi topping, so luong, them vao gio hang
- **Gio hang** voi qua doi ten, topping, coupon, phi giao hang (mien phi neu >= 100K)
- **Thanh toan** voi 2 hinh thuc (giao hang / tu lay), chon chi nhanh, nhap dia chi, ma coupon, 4 phuong thuc thanh toan (COD, chuyen khoan, MoMo, ZaloPay)
- **Lich su don hang** voi loc theo trang thai
- **Theo doi don hang** voi timeline tien trinh 5 buoc (dat hang -> xac nhan -> chuan bi -> dang giao -> hoan thanh)
- **Danh sach yeu thich** (wishlist)
- **Thong bao** voi loc da doc / chua doc
- **Ho so** voi 3 tab: thong tin, doi mat khau, dia chi
- **Dark mode**

### 3.2. Quan Tri Vien (Admin)
- **Dashboard** voi 4 stat cards (doanh thu, don hang, mon an, nguoi dung), bieu do Area (doanh thu), Bar (don hang), Bar (top mon an), Pie (phan bo danh muc), don hang gan day
- **Quan ly mon an** (CRUD, toggle trang thai, duplicate)
- **Quan ly don hang** (loc theo trang thai, cap nhat trang thai, gan shipper)
- **Quan ly nguoi dung** (loc theo role, toggle active/inactive)
- **Quan ly khuyen mai** (CRUD coupon: ma, loai, gia tri, han su dung, gioi han)
- **Quan ly chi nhanh** (CRUD: ten, dia chi, SDT, gio mo cua, kinh do / vi do)

### 3.3. Shipper
- **Dashboard** voi 3 stat cards (don cho, dang giao, hoan thanh hom nay)
- **Danh sach don hang** can giao voi nut cap nhat trang thai
- **Lich su giao hang** (cac don da hoan thanh)

### 3.4. Backend API
- **Auth:** register, register-admin, register-shipper, login, logout, refresh-token, get-me, update-profile, change-password, wishlist CRUD
- **Foods:** CRUD, featured, categories, search (text, category, price range, sort, pagination)
- **Orders:** create, get-my-orders, get-by-id, update-status, assign-shipper, cancel, get-all (admin), get-shipper-orders
- **Reviews:** create (kiem tra mua hang), get-by-food, delete
- **Coupons:** validate, CRUD
- **Branches:** public list, admin CRUD
- **Notifications:** get, mark-read, mark-all-read, delete
- **Upload:** single image upload (multer)
- **Admin:** overview stats, revenue stats, top foods, category stats, users management, shippers list
- **Real-time:** Socket.io emit `newOrder` (to admin), `orderUpdate` (to customer), `newDelivery` (to shipper)

## 4. Cac Van De Phat Hien Trong Codebase

### VAN DE NGHIEM TRONG (Can xu ly)

1. **bookingApi khong ton tai trong axiosClient** (`frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js` va `frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx`)
   - File `axiosClient.js` chi export: authApi, foodApi, orderApi, reviewApi, couponApi, branchApi, notificationApi, adminApi, uploadApi
   - Khong co `bookingApi` -> se gay loi runtime khi su dung AdminBookingsPage hoac bookingsSlice

2. **Ma bi mat (secret keys) hardcoded trong code** (`backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.js`)
   - `ADMIN_SECRET = 'ADMINNHAHANGVIET'` (dong 61)
   - `SHIPPER_SECRET = 'SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET'` (dong 94)
   - Nen chuyen vao .env

3. **In-memory rate limiter** (`backend/src/middlewares/rateLimiter.middleware.js`)
   - Su dung Map trong RAM, khong hoat dong neu co nhieu server instances

### VAN DE TRUNG BINH

4. **Inconsistency route branch** (`backend/src/routes/admin.routes.js`)
   - Admin route khong dinh nghia `/api/admin/branches`
   - Nhung branch.route.js lai co `/branches/admin/list` -> khong khop

5. **Old/duplicate files con ton tai** trong codebase
   - `backend/src/models/Food.js`, `backend/src/models/Booking.js` (cu)
   - `backend/src/controllers/foodController.js`, `backend/src/controllers/bookingController.js` (cu)
   - `backend/src/routes/foodRoutes.js`, `backend/src/routes/bookingRoutes.js` (cu)
   - `frontend/src/slices/bookingsSlice.js` (cu)
   - `frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPage.jsx` (cu)
   - Cac file nay con duoc import o day do nhung co the lam nhieu developer

6. **Don hang shipper chua co action "Nhan don"** (`ShipperDashboardPage.jsx`, dong 119)
   - Chi co nut "Cap nhat" nhung khong co api de shipper tu nhan don. Viec nhan don thuc te do admin assign shipper

7. **"Dat lai don" chua co logic** (`OrderTrackingPage.jsx`, dong 272)
   - Button "Dat lai don" chi la UI placeholder, khong co ham xu ly

## 5. Database Seed

He thong co san du lieu mau voi:
- **5 nguoi dung:** admin (admin@nhavien.com/admin123), shipper, 3 khach hang (user1@nhavien.com/user1234)
- **27 mon an** voi hinh anh Unsplash, danh muc da duoc dinh nghia (17 danh muc)
- **5 coupon:** WELCOME50, GIAM10, FREESHIP, SUMMER20, NEWUSER
- **6 chi nhanh** tai TP.HCM
- **Reviews** cho 10 mon an dau tien

## 6. Cau Hinh Moi Truong

- **Backend:** PORT 5000, MongoDB localhost:27017, JWT secrets, ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174
- **Frontend:** PORT 5173, proxy `/api` va `/uploads` sang localhost:5000

## 7. Tom Tat

Day la mot he thong quan ly nha hang full-stack hoan chinh voi 3 vai tro (khach hang, admin, shipper), tinh nang dat mon online day du, gio hang, coupon, chi nhanh, thong bao realtime (Socket.io), bieu do thong ke (admin), dark mode, responsive UI. He thong su dung kien truc MVC nhua, RESTful API, JWT authentication, MongoDB. Cac van de chinh can xu ly la `bookingApi` khong ton tai, secret keys hardcoded, va mot so file cu con ton tai trong codebase.

## Ý Tưởng Nâng Cấp Cho Hệ Thống Nhà Hàng

### Nhóm 1: Tính năng Cốt lõi (nâng cấp từ những gì đã có)

| # | Ý tưởng | Mô tả | Tác động |
|---|---------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **Đặt bàn tích hợp** | Kết hợp đặt bàn trực tuyến với đặt món. Khách chọn bàn, giờ, số người → đặt món trước khi đến. | Rất cao |
| 2 | **QR Order - Gọi món tại bàn** | Mỗi bàn có QR code → quét → xem menu → gọi món → thanh toán tại bàn. Biến website thành "POS online". | Rất cao |
| 3 | **Kitchen Display System (KDS)** | Màn hình bếp hiển thị order mới, trạng thái món đang nấu, món đã xong. Admin/phục vụ thấy realtime. | Cao |
| 4 | **Đếm người đang chờ (Waitlist)** | Khi nhà hàng full, khách đăng ký chờ → nhận thông báo khi có bàn trống (Socket.io). | Cao |
| 5 | **Lịch sử đặt bàn** | Khách xem lịch sử đặt bàn, hủy/đổi giờ, nhắc nhở trước giờ đặt. | Trung bình |

---

### Nhóm 2: Tăng trưởng & Doanh thu

| # | Ý tưởng | Mô tả | Tác động |
|---|---------|-------|----------|
| 6 | **Chương trình Tích điểm / Thành viên** | Đơn hàng tích xu, đổi thưởng (giảm giá, voucher, quà). Cấp độ: Bạc → Vàng → Kim Cương → VIP. | Rất cao |
| 7 | **Đặt món trước (Pre-order)** | Khách đặt món cho ngày/giờ cụ thể. Phục vụ tiệc, picnic, sự kiện. | Cao |
| 8 | **Combo / Bundle / Set Menu** | Nhóm món ăn thành combo ( vd: "Bữa trưa văn phòng 89K"). Tăng AOV. | Cao |
| 9 | **Dynamic Pricing** | Giá thay đổi theo giờ (giờ thấp điểm giảm 10-20%), ngày lễ tăng. | Trung bình |
| 10 | **Gói Subscription** | "Gói ăn văn phòng tháng" - 20 bữa/tháng, giao 1 lần/tuần. Recurring revenue. | Cao |

---

### Nhóm 3: Trải nghiệm người dùng

| # | Ý tưởng | Mô tả | Tác động |

| 12 | **Đánh giá có hình ảnh + AI tóm tắt** | Khách up ảnh món ăn khi review. AI tóm tắt phản hồi của khách. | Trung bình |

| 14 | **Đa ngôn ngữ (i18n)** | Hỗ trợ tiếng Việt / Tiếng Anh / Tiếng Trung. Phục vụ khách nước ngoài. | Trung bình |
| 15 | **Dark Mode cải thiện + Theme** | Ngoài dark mode, thêm theme màu sắc khác (xanh lá, hồng, classic). | Thấp |

### Nhóm 4: Vận hành & Mở rộng

========================
YÊU CẦU ĐẶC BIỆT CHO MỖI TÍNH NĂNG
========================

1. Đặt bàn tích hợp
- Chọn branch -> bàn -> giờ -> số người -> món pre-order
- Không cho trùng bàn cùng khung giờ
- Có validation ở cả frontend và backend

2. QR Order
- Mỗi bàn có mã QR riêng
- Khi scan vào route /qr/:tableCode
- Tự load menu của bàn/chi nhánh đó
- Order tạo ra phải gắn table và source = qr_table

3. KDS
- Giao diện dạng cột:
  - mới nhận
  - đang nấu
  - sẵn sàng
  - hoàn tất
- Realtime qua Socket.io
- Có âm báo hoặc highlight khi có order mới

4. Loyalty / thành viên
- Tự cộng điểm sau order hoàn tất
- Tự tính tier dựa trên tổng chi tiêu hoặc điểm
- Có trang lịch sử điểm

5. Combo
- Combo có nhiều item
- Tính giá combo
- Hiển thị rõ tiết kiệm bao nhiêu

6. Tồn kho
- Mỗi món có thể map với nguyên liệu
- Khi order done hoặc preparing thì trừ kho theo rule
- Nếu stock thấp thì cảnh báo
- Nếu không đủ tồn thì có thể auto set unavailable

7. AI chatbot
- Tạo service adapter:
  - mock mode
  - claude mode
- Nếu chưa có API key thì dùng mock recommendation logic

8. PWA
- Có manifest
- installable
- offline cache menu cơ bản

9. Dashboard nâng cao
- Revenue by day/week/month
- top món
- top khách hàng
- reservation volume
- low stock alerts
- loyalty distribution

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\services\socket.service.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     3→
     4→function initSocket(io) {
     5→  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
     6→    // Authenticate socket connection
     7→    const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
     8→    if (token) {
     9→      try {
    10→        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    11→        User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken').then((user) => {
    12→          if (user) {
    13→            socket.user = user;
    14→            socket.join(`user:${user._id}`);
    15→            if (user.role === 'admin') socket.join('admin');
    16→            if (user.role === 'shipper') socket.join('shipper');
    17→            socket.emit('connected', { userId: user._id, role: user.role });
    18→          }
    19→        }).catch(() => {});
    20→      } catch {}
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    // Join room
    24→    socket.on('join', (data) => {
    25→      if (data.room) {
    26→        socket.join(data.room);
    27→      }
    28→      if (data.type === 'guest' && data.phone) {
    29→        socket.join(`guest:${data.phone}`);
    30→      }
    31→    });
    32→
    33→    // Leave room
    34→    socket.on('leave', (data) => {
    35→      if (data.room) {
    36→        socket.leave(data.room);
    37→      }
    38→    });
    39→
```

 `C:\Users\Admin\source\repos\bt-quanlibooking\backend\src\middlewares\auth.middleware.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     4→
     5→const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
     6→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Access token required. Please login.', data: null });
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  try {
    12→    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    13→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    14→    if (!user || !user.isActive) {
    15→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid or inactive user', data: null });
    16→    }
    17→    req.user = user;
    18→    next();
    19→  } catch (err) {
    20→    if (err.name === 'JsonWebTokenError' || err.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
    21→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token is invalid or expired', data: null });
    22→    }
    23→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication failed', data: null });
    24→  }
    25→});
    26→
    27→const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
    28→  if (!req.user) {
    29→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication required', data: null });
    30→  }
    31→  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    32→    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Insufficient permissions', data: null });
    33→  }
    34→  next();
    35→};
    36→
    37→const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
    39→  if (token) {
    40→    try {
    41→      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    42→      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    43→    } catch {
    44→      // Token invalid, continue without user
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→  next();
    48→});
    49→
    50→module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };
    51→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useEffect } from 'react';

     4→import store from './store';
     5→import router from './routes';
     6→import { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast';
     7→import socketService from './lib/socket';
     8→
     9→function App() {
    10→  // Initialize dark mode from localStorage
    11→  useEffect(() => {
    12→    const isDark = localStorage.getItem('theme') === 'dark' ||
    13→      (!localStorage.getItem('theme') && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
    14→    if (isDark) {
    15→      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
    16→    } else {
    17→      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
    18→    }
    19→  }, []);
    20→
    21→  // Connect Socket.io when authenticated
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    24→    if (token) {
    25→      socketService.connect(token);
    26→    }
    27→    return () => {
    28→      socketService.disconnect();
    29→    };
    30→  }, []);
    31→
    32→  return (
    33→    <Provider store={store}>
    34→      <RouterProvider router={router} />
    35→      <Toaster
    36→        position="top-right"
    37→        toastOptions={{
    38→          style: {
    39→            fontFamily: '"DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif',
    40→          },
    41→        }}
    42→        theme="light"
    43→        richColors
    44→        closeButton
    45→      />
    46→    </Provider>
    47→  );
    48→}
    49→
    50→export default App;
```
